project.name: Private Payments for Stellar
project.description: A proof-of-concept privacy-preserving payment system for the Stellar network, enabling private deposits, transfers, and withdrawals via Groth16 zero-knowledge proofs (Circom circuits) running in the browser through WebAssembly, with Soroban smart contracts enforcing Association Set Provider (ASP) membership and non-membership controls. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.

nodes.name: sparse_merkle_tree.rs
nodes.summary: In-memory Sparse Merkle Tree (SMT) implementation with insert/update/delete/find and proof-finalization, used to build the off-chain non-membership and membership witnesses consumed by the policy circuit.
nodes.languageNotes: 1046-line port of the circomlibjs SMT semantics in Rust with Poseidon2 hashes, in-memory key/value DB backend, and proof helpers for both populated and override scenarios.

nodes.name: SMTDatabase
nodes.summary: Abstract database trait defining the storage operations (get/set/multi_ins/multi_del/root) needed by the SparseMerkleTree.

nodes.name: SMTMemDB
nodes.summary: In-memory implementation of SMTDatabase using a HashMap, suitable for tests and witness preparation.

nodes.name: SparseMerkleTree
nodes.summary: Generic SMT over an SMTDatabase backend with insert/update/delete/find operations that maintain the Poseidon2-hashed root and emit proof siblings.

nodes.name: SMTResult
nodes.summary: Output of an SMT mutation containing the old/new roots and the affected siblings used to assemble a proof.

nodes.name: FindResult
nodes.summary: Output of `SMT.find` capturing whether the key was found, the matching value, and the sibling path supporting a (non-)membership proof.

nodes.name: SMTProof
nodes.summary: Final on-the-wire SMT proof carrying the key, found/not-found markers, siblings, and the tree root for use as a Circom witness.

nodes.name: poseidon2_compression_sparse
nodes.summary: BigInt-based Poseidon2 2:1 compression used internally by the SMT to match the in-circuit hash semantics on BigInt-encoded keys/values.

nodes.name: poseidon2_hash3_sparse
nodes.summary: BigInt-based Poseidon2 hash over three field elements (key, value, is-leaf flag) used to seal SMT leaf nodes.

nodes.name: insert
nodes.summary: SMT insert operation that walks the tree to the insertion point, handles colliding-prefix splits, recomputes node hashes, and returns the affected siblings/root.

nodes.name: delete
nodes.summary: SMT delete operation that locates a leaf, removes it, collapses singleton siblings, and emits the resulting root and sibling diff.

nodes.name: update
nodes.summary: SMT update operation that overwrites an existing leaf's value and rehashes the path back to the root.

nodes.name: find
nodes.summary: Public entry point that searches the SMT for a key, returning a FindResult with siblings and a found/not-found marker.

nodes.name: _find
nodes.summary: Recursive internal worker that descends bit-by-bit through SMT records and accumulates the sibling path until it lands on a leaf, empty slot, or different-key collision.

nodes.name: finalize_proof
nodes.summary: Looks up a key in the populated tree, pads the sibling list to a fixed depth, and packages the result as an SMTProof witness for Circom.

nodes.name: prepare_smt_proof
nodes.summary: Builds a fresh SMT (auto-populated with a small fixed key range), then finalizes a proof for the requested key and depth.

nodes.name: prepare_smt_proof_with_overrides
nodes.summary: Builds an SMT populated solely from caller-supplied (key,value) overrides, then finalizes a non-membership/membership proof — used by the policy tests to inject custom ASP non-membership trees.

nodes.name: new_mem_empty_trie
nodes.summary: Constructs a fresh in-memory SMT with an SMTMemDB backend at the zero root, used as the starting point in tests.

nodes.name: test_new_tree
nodes.summary: Reference-vector test asserting that the Rust SMT produces the same roots as the canonical circomlibjs implementation after insert/update/find operations.

nodes.name: test_tree_proofs
nodes.summary: Tests SMT proofs by inserting batches of keys, looking them up, and asserting found/not-found markers and sibling counts.

nodes.name: run_case_hash

nodes.name: test_poseidon2_compression

nodes.name: test_poseidon2_hash_2_matrix

nodes.name: test_selective_disclosure_wrong_root_fails

nodes.name: merkle_tree.rs

nodes.name: keypair.rs
nodes.summary: Off-circuit keypair helpers that derive a Poseidon2-based public key from a private key and sign commitments to mirror the Circom keypair gadget.

nodes.name: derive_public_key
nodes.summary: Derives the Poseidon2-based public key for a given private scalar, matching the in-circuit derivation.

nodes.name: sign
nodes.summary: Produces a deterministic Poseidon2-based signature over a commitment using the supplied private key and path-index salt.

nodes.name: general.rs
nodes.summary: General-purpose test helpers: Poseidon2 compression/hash wrappers, scalar/bigint conversions, and `load_artifacts` for loading the wasm + r1cs files of a named Circom circuit.

nodes.name: poseidon2_compression
nodes.summary: Off-chain Poseidon2 2:1 compression helper used by the SMT/test code (separate copy from core::merkle to keep test-only imports isolated).

nodes.name: poseidon2_hash2
nodes.summary: Poseidon2 hash over two field elements with an optional domain-separation tag, mirroring the Circom Hash(2) gadget.

nodes.name: poseidon2_hash3
nodes.summary: Poseidon2 hash over three field elements with optional domain tag, used for commitments and nullifiers.

nodes.name: scalar_to_bigint
nodes.summary: Converts an ark-bn254 Scalar into the num-bigint BigInt encoding required by the Circom witness generator.

nodes.name: load_artifacts

nodes.name: circom_tester.rs
nodes.summary: Test harness that wraps Circom witness generation and ark-Groth16 proving/verification, exposing a typed `Inputs` builder, key management, and `prove_and_verify` helpers consumed by every circuit test.
nodes.languageNotes: Provides a fluent `SignalKey` DSL for indexed signal names, plus key generation/loading and end-to-end Groth16 prove-and-verify (with and without persisted keys).

nodes.name: SignalKey
nodes.summary: Fluent builder for Circom signal names with optional indices and struct fields, producing the canonical dotted/indexed key used by the witness generator.

nodes.name: Inputs
nodes.summary: Typed container that accumulates Circom circuit inputs keyed by SignalKey (or string), bridging Rust scalars/vectors into BigInt witness data.

nodes.name: InputValue
nodes.summary: Sum type representing a single Circom signal value (BigInt scalar, vector, or nested vector) with From conversions for ergonomic test construction.

nodes.name: CircuitKeys
nodes.summary: Container for a Groth16 proving key and prepared verifying key shared across multiple proofs of the same circuit.

nodes.name: CircomResult
nodes.summary: Return type bundling the proof, verifying key, and public inputs produced by `prove_and_verify_with_keys`.

nodes.name: generate_keys
nodes.summary: Runs the Groth16 trusted-setup ceremony for a given R1CS, returning the proving and prepared verifying keys.

nodes.name: load_keys
nodes.summary: Loads previously generated Groth16 proving/verifying keys from disk for circuits that ship with precomputed setup output.

nodes.name: prove_and_verify_with_keys
nodes.summary: Generates the Circom witness, produces a Groth16 proof with the supplied keys, verifies it, and returns the proof plus public inputs.

nodes.name: prove_and_verify
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper that generates fresh keys and runs `prove_and_verify_with_keys` in one call, used by tests that don't need to share keys.

nodes.name: transaction.rs
nodes.summary: Transaction-related helpers used by tests: native `commitment` and `nullifier` computation, a deterministic Rng64 LCG, random commitment generation, and `prepopulated_leaves` for seeding Merkle trees.

nodes.name: commitment
nodes.summary: Computes a Poseidon2-based note commitment from (amount, pubkey, blinding), matching the in-circuit definition.

nodes.name: nullifier
nodes.summary: Computes a Poseidon2-based nullifier from (commitment, path indices, signature), matching the in-circuit definition.

nodes.name: prepopulated_leaves
nodes.summary: Generates a deterministic leaf vector for a Merkle tree of the given level count, leaving specified indices empty and filling the rest with random commitments.

nodes.name: transaction_case.rs
nodes.summary: High-level transaction test case abstraction: `TxCase` (inputs+outputs), `TransactionWitness` derivation, base-input wiring for the Circom transaction circuit, and `prove_transaction_case` that runs Groth16 prove-and-verify on the assembled witness.

nodes.name: InputNote
nodes.summary: Test fixture describing an input note (leaf index, private key, blinding, amount) consumed by the transaction circuit.

nodes.name: OutputNote
nodes.summary: Test fixture describing an output note (public key, blinding, amount) produced by the transaction circuit.

nodes.name: TxCase
nodes.summary: Bundle of input and output notes representing a complete transaction test scenario.

nodes.name: TransactionWitness
nodes.summary: Off-chain witness produced from a TxCase: Merkle root, public keys, nullifiers, path indices, and flattened path elements ready for Circom.

nodes.name: prepare_transaction_witness
nodes.summary: Derives the off-chain transaction witness from a TxCase and leaf set: computes commitments, public keys, Merkle root, per-input Merkle proofs, signatures, and nullifiers.

nodes.name: build_base_inputs

nodes.name: prove_transaction_case
nodes.summary: End-to-end helper that prepares the witness, builds Circom inputs, and runs Groth16 prove-and-verify (catching panics to return a Result for negative tests).

nodes.name: mod.rs

nodes.summary: Computes the 2-to-1 Poseidon2 compression of two BN254 field elements, matching the in-circuit hash used at every Merkle tree node.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Barrel module that aggregates every Circom circuit prove/verify test suite (keypair, merkle, policy, poseidon2, selective disclosure, sparse, transaction) along with the shared test utilities.

nodes.name: prove_keypair.rs

nodes.name: test_keypair_test_matrix

nodes.name: prove_policy.rs

nodes.summary: Negative test asserting that submitting a transaction with two identical nullifiers (double spend) is rejected by the policy circuit.

nodes.name: poseidon2_instance_bn256.rs
nodes.summary: Precomputed Poseidon2 parameters (round constants and internal MDS diagonals) for the BN254/BN256 scalar field across multiple state widths.

nodes.name: poseidon2_instance_goldilocks.rs

nodes.name: poseidon2_params.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the `Poseidon2Params` struct holding all permutation parameters and computes equivalent round constants for the optimized internal-rounds layout.

nodes.name: utils.rs
nodes.summary: Generic matrix inversion and transpose helpers over a `PrimeField`, used to derive equivalent round constants for the Poseidon2 internal-rounds optimization.

nodes.name: Poseidon2
nodes.summary: Generic Poseidon2 permutation instance parameterized by a prime field and an Arc-shared `Poseidon2Params` configuration.

nodes.name: permutation
nodes.summary: Applies the full Poseidon2 permutation to an input state: external MDS multiplication, then alternating full and partial rounds with S-box and round constants.

nodes.name: sbox
nodes.summary: Applies the full-round S-box (x^d) elementwise to the permutation state.

nodes.name: sbox_p
nodes.summary: Computes the partial-round S-box on a single field element via square-and-multiply for supported exponents (d = 3, 5, 7).

nodes.name: matmul_m4
nodes.summary: Applies the 4x4 MDS submatrix multiplication used as a building block for the external linear layer in widths divisible by four.

nodes.name: matmul_external
nodes.summary: Applies the external MDS matrix multiplication that mixes the entire state, with specialized fast paths for state widths 2, 3, and 4.

nodes.name: matmul_internal
nodes.summary: Applies the internal MDS matrix multiplication for partial rounds using the diagonal-plus-one optimization with specialized small-width paths.

nodes.name: add_rc
nodes.summary: Adds the round constants vector to the current state, producing a new state for the next sub-round.

nodes.name: Poseidon2Params
nodes.summary: Configuration struct bundling state width, S-box degree, full/partial round counts, MDS matrices, and round constants for a Poseidon2 instance.

nodes.name: equivalent_round_constants
nodes.summary: Transforms the original round constants into the equivalent set required by the optimized partial-rounds layout by inverting the internal MDS matrix.

nodes.name: mat_vec_mul
nodes.summary: Generic dense matrix-vector multiplication over a prime field used during parameter precomputation.

nodes.name: mat_inverse
nodes.summary: Computes the inverse of a square matrix over a prime field using Gauss-Jordan elimination with explicit pivot scaling.

nodes.name: mat_transpose
nodes.summary: Computes the transpose of a 2D matrix represented as a vector of row vectors over a generic field.

nodes.name: admin.js
nodes.summary: Admin console controller that connects a Stellar wallet, derives ASP keys, and drives insertion of membership/non-membership leaves into the ASP Soroban contracts via Freighter-signed transactions.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses BigInt parsing for u256 field elements and manual hex byte-reversal for non-membership keys.

nodes.name: showToast
nodes.summary: Clones a toast template, applies success/error styling, appends to the toast container, and schedules auto-dismissal.

nodes.name: parseBigIntInput
nodes.summary: Parses a user-provided decimal/hex string into a BigInt, throwing a labeled error if the input is invalid.

nodes.summary: Submits an insert_leaf Soroban transaction to the non-membership (blocklist) ASP contract for a given key/value pair.

nodes.name: stellar.js
nodes.summary: Soroban transaction submission helpers that sign with Freighter, patch authorization entries, and poll RPC for finality for pool transact and public key registration flows.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses ScInt i256 conversion and manually patches XDR auth entries after wallet signing to inject signed Soroban auth blobs.

nodes.name: parseHex32ToBytes
nodes.summary: Parses a 32-byte hex string (with optional 0x prefix) into a Uint8Array, validating length and hex characters.

nodes.name: toBytes
nodes.summary: Coerces a value into a Uint8Array, supporting arrays, typed arrays, and existing byte buffers.

nodes.name: parseU256HexToBigInt
nodes.summary: Parses a hex string into a BigInt suitable for u256 ScVal construction, labeling errors with the source field name.

nodes.name: getPreparedPublicFields
nodes.summary: Extracts proof, public signals, and Merkle roots from a prepared transaction object, normalizing field naming variations.

nodes.name: patchAuthEntries
nodes.summary: Decodes a transaction envelope XDR, replaces the InvokeHostFunction operation's auth array with wallet-signed Soroban auth entries, and re-encodes.

nodes.name: submitPreparedSorobanTx
nodes.summary: Submits a pre-prepared Soroban transaction by collecting wallet-signed auth entries, patching the envelope, signing it, and polling RPC for finality.

nodes.name: submitProvedPoolTransact
nodes.summary: Converts proved circuit outputs to ScVals, invokes the pool's transact method, signs with Freighter, and polls for transaction success.

nodes.name: submitPublicKeyRegistration
nodes.summary: Registers a user's note and encryption public keys to the registry contract by building, signing, and submitting a Soroban transaction.

nodes.name: ui.js
nodes.summary: Barrel module that wires together the main UI modules (navigation, address-book, notes-table, transactions, templates, on-chain state, pool-events) into the global UI surface.

nodes.name: address-book.js
nodes.summary: Address book UI module exposing an AddressBook namespace that renders registered users, supports searching and filtering, and lets users prefill transfers with selected recipients.
nodes.languageNotes: Methods live on a module-level object rather than a class; events bridge to App.events for cross-module refresh.

nodes.name: core.js
nodes.summary: Shared UI primitives exposing the App event bus, common Utils (clipboard, hex truncation, formatting), and a Toast notification helper used by every other UI module.

nodes.name: navigation.js
nodes.summary: Top-level navigation controller exporting Tabs (page switching) and Wallet (Freighter connection / onboarding orchestration) namespaces wired into the app shell.

nodes.name: notes-table.js
nodes.summary: Renders the user's owned shielded notes in a sortable table, pulling live note data through the WASM facade and rendering via shared templates.

nodes.name: onboarding-wizard.js
nodes.summary: Multi-step onboarding wizard that walks new users through disclaimer acknowledgement, key derivation, and on-chain public key registration before unlocking the app.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a sizable inline markdown renderer for disclaimer content.

nodes.name: renderDisclaimerMarkdown
nodes.summary: Renders a constrained markdown subset (headings, lists, emphasis, code) to safe HTML for the onboarding disclaimer step.

nodes.name: setError
nodes.summary: Displays or clears a wizard error banner with the supplied message and visibility toggle.

nodes.name: setStepState
nodes.summary: Updates the visual state (active/complete/pending) of a single wizard step indicator.

nodes.name: makeButton
nodes.summary: Factory that builds a styled wizard action button with label, click handler, and optional disabled state.

nodes.name: renderStepContent
nodes.summary: Dispatches to the appropriate step renderer based on the wizard's current step index.

nodes.name: runOnboardingWizard
nodes.summary: Drives the full onboarding flow: disclaimer acceptance, key derivation via wallet signature, and submitting public-key registration on Stellar.

nodes.name: onchain-state.js
nodes.summary: UI module that fetches and displays the live on-chain ASP state (root, leaf count, admin flag) through the WASM facade.

nodes.name: setStatus
nodes.summary: Sets the status banner text and CSS state class for the on-chain state panel.

nodes.name: persistent-storage.js
nodes.summary: Requests the browser's StorageManager.persist permission via a user-confirmation modal so encrypted notes survive eviction.

nodes.name: showPersistModal
nodes.summary: Renders a modal asking the user to grant persistent storage permission and resolves with their choice.

nodes.name: ensurePersistentStorage
nodes.summary: Checks for and requests StorageManager.persist, showing the consent modal when needed and updating App state on success.

nodes.name: pool-events.js
nodes.summary: Subscribes to and renders pool transaction events (deposits, withdrawals, transacts) streamed from the indexer via the WASM facade.

nodes.name: setStatus
nodes.summary: Updates the pool-events panel status text and visual state.

nodes.name: templates.js
nodes.summary: Provides reusable DOM-template builders (rows, cards, badges) for notes, events, and addresses, plus base-unit decimal formatting helpers.

nodes.name: formatBaseUnitsForDisplay
nodes.summary: Formats a base-unit BigInt amount into a human-readable decimal string with the configured decimal places.

nodes.name: setTabsRef
nodes.summary: Injects a reference to the Tabs navigation module so templates can wire tab-switching actions without a hard dependency cycle.

nodes.name: transactions.js
nodes.summary: Transactions UI module orchestrating deposit, transfer, and withdraw flows: validates inputs, balances, and recipients, calls the WASM prover, and submits proved transactions to Soroban.
nodes.languageNotes: Performs precise XLM-to-stroops BigInt math to avoid floating-point loss in transfer amounts.

nodes.name: noteAmountToStroopsBigInt
nodes.summary: Converts a user-entered XLM amount string into a stroops BigInt, raising on invalid input.

nodes.name: tryParseXlmToStroopsBigInt
nodes.summary: Best-effort parses an XLM string into stroops, returning null on failure rather than throwing.

nodes.name: baseUnitsBigIntToDecimalText
nodes.summary: Converts a base-unit BigInt into a trimmed decimal string with the configured precision.

nodes.name: setLoading
nodes.summary: Toggles loading-spinner UI on action buttons during transaction submission.

nodes.name: collectAdvancedRecipients
nodes.summary: Collects all advanced-mode recipient rows from the transfer form into a normalized list.

nodes.name: sumInputNotesStroops
nodes.summary: Sums the stroop values of the currently selected input notes for balance validation.

nodes.name: setEqValidity
nodes.summary: Validates that input notes equal outputs plus public delta and highlights the form when the equation does not balance.

nodes.name: updateTransferBalance
nodes.summary: Recomputes and re-renders the live transfer balance summary as input notes and recipient amounts change.

nodes.name: updateTransactBalance
nodes.summary: Recomputes the deposit/withdraw balance summary (public delta vs note flows) and toggles submit-button enabled state.

nodes.name: wallet.js
nodes.summary: Thin Freighter wallet integration exposing connect, network/address getters, signing helpers, and a deterministic key-derivation routine driven by a signed wallet message.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Freighter API for signing and derives ASP keys from a deterministic signature over a domain-separated message.

nodes.name: ensureFreighterReady
nodes.summary: Waits for the Freighter API to load in the browser and verifies it is available before any wallet operation.

nodes.name: connectWallet
nodes.summary: Requests Freighter access and returns the connected wallet's public address.

nodes.name: getWalletAddress
nodes.summary: Returns the currently connected Freighter wallet address, or null if no wallet is connected.

nodes.name: startWalletWatcher
nodes.summary: Polls Freighter for wallet address/network changes and invokes a callback whenever they change.

nodes.name: getWalletNetwork
nodes.summary: Returns the Stellar network passphrase the Freighter wallet is currently connected to.

nodes.name: signWalletTransaction
nodes.summary: Signs a Stellar transaction XDR via Freighter and returns the signed envelope.

nodes.name: signWalletAuthEntry
nodes.summary: Signs a Soroban authorization entry via Freighter for use in patched InvokeHostFunction transactions.

nodes.name: signWalletMessage
nodes.summary: Signs an arbitrary message with the Freighter wallet, used for deterministic key derivation.

nodes.name: deriveKeysFromWallet
nodes.summary: Derives the user's ASP note key, encryption key, and public counterparts from a deterministic Freighter signature over a domain-separated message via the WASM client.

nodes.name: wasm-facade.js
nodes.summary: Tiny facade module that lazily initializes the Rust/WASM web client and exposes a singleton handle to the rest of the app.

nodes.name: initializeWasm
nodes.summary: Lazily initializes the wasm-bindgen WebClient bundle, returning a cached handle on subsequent calls.

nodes.name: getHandle
nodes.summary: Returns the cached WASM client handle, throwing if initializeWasm has not yet been called.

nodes.name: r1cs.rs
nodes.summary: Custom binary R1CS file parser that reads a Circom-generated .r1cs section structure into in-memory Term/LinearCombination/Constraint/R1CS structs, used by Prover to feed arkworks Groth16.
nodes.languageNotes: Hand-rolled cursor-based binary reader with explicit bounds-checking; supports the multi-section R1CS layout produced by snarkjs/circom.

nodes.name: Term
nodes.summary: Single coefficient-times-wire term inside a linear combination of an R1CS constraint.

nodes.name: LinearCombination
nodes.summary: Ordered list of Terms representing one side (A, B, or C) of an R1CS constraint.

nodes.name: Constraint
nodes.summary: Single rank-1 constraint encoded as three linear combinations (a, b, c) satisfying a*b = c.

nodes.name: R1CS
nodes.summary: Parsed R1CS file holding wire counts (total/public/private), the derived public-input count, and the full list of constraints.

nodes.name: R1CSHeader
nodes.summary: Decoded header section of an R1CS file (field size, wire counts, constraint count).

nodes.name: Cursor
nodes.summary: Internal byte-cursor over the R1CS input buffer providing bounded read_bytes / read_u32_le / read_u64_le / skip helpers.

nodes.name: R1CS::parse
nodes.summary: Top-level R1CS file parser that validates the magic/version, iterates the section table, decodes the header and constraints sections, and returns a fully populated R1CS struct.

nodes.name: parse_constraints
nodes.summary: Decodes the constraints section by reading three linear combinations per constraint and assembling them into Constraint values.

nodes.name: parse_linear_combination
nodes.summary: Reads a single LinearCombination by parsing its (wire_id, field-element coefficient) pairs using the header's field size.

nodes.name: serialization.rs
nodes.summary: Field-element serialization helpers bridging arkworks BN254 (Fr) and the project's Field/Scalar types: byte/hex conversions, witness parsing, and Circom-style 0x-hex encoding of field elements.

nodes.name: bytes_to_prime_field
nodes.summary: Generic helper that decodes a 32-byte little-endian buffer into any prime field element via from_le_bytes_mod_order.

nodes.name: prime_field_to_bytes
nodes.summary: Generic helper that serializes a prime field element into 32 little-endian bytes, zero-padded if the field representation is shorter.

nodes.name: hex_to_scalar
nodes.summary: Parses a 0x-prefixed (or bare) big-endian hex string into a BN254 scalar, validating length and producing little-endian bytes for from_le_bytes_mod_order.

nodes.name: parse_witness
nodes.summary: Validates that a witness byte buffer is a multiple of FIELD_SIZE (32 bytes per element) and returns it as an owned Vec.

nodes.name: decimal_to_field_bytes
nodes.summary: Parses a u128 decimal string and packs it into a 32-byte little-endian field representation via high/low 64-bit halves.

nodes.name: sparse_merkle.rs
nodes.summary: Sparse Merkle Tree (SMT) implementation matching the Circom SMT circuits: supports insert/update/find with sibling path generation, plus wasm-bindgen wrapper types (WasmSparseMerkleTree, WasmSMTResult, WasmFindResult, SMTProof) for browser integration with the ASP non-membership flows.
nodes.languageNotes: Mirrors the iden3/circomlib SMT semantics (Node::Empty/Leaf/Internal, bit-by-bit descent, is_old0 flag) so off-chain trees produce paths the Circom verifiers accept.

nodes.name: Node
nodes.summary: SMT node variants — Empty, Leaf(key,value), or Internal(left,right) — that compose the in-memory tree storage.

nodes.name: FindResult
nodes.summary: Result of an SMT find() including found flag, sibling path, found_value, not-found-key/value, and the is_old0 marker used by the non-membership circuit.

nodes.name: SMTResult
nodes.summary: Result of an SMT insert/update including old_root, new_root, sibling path, old/new key-value pair, and is_old0 flag — the canonical witness emitted to the circuit.

nodes.name: SparseMerkleTree
nodes.summary: Pure-Rust hash-addressed Sparse Merkle Tree with an internal node DB and current root; provides new/find/insert/update with Poseidon2-based hashing.

nodes.name: WasmSparseMerkleTree
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen wrapper exposing SparseMerkleTree to JavaScript with byte-oriented insert/update/find/get_proof methods.

nodes.name: WasmSMTResult
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen view over SMTResult exposing byte-array getters (old_root, new_root, siblings, old_key/value, new_key/value, is_old0, num_siblings) to JavaScript.

nodes.name: WasmFindResult
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen view over FindResult plus the current root, exposing byte-array getters for membership/non-membership proof construction in JavaScript.

nodes.name: SMTProof
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-friendly bundle returned by get_proof: SMT find result plus the current root, ready to be fed to the ASP membership/non-membership circuits.

nodes.name: find_internal
nodes.summary: Bit-by-bit descent through the SMT collecting siblings, terminating in either a matching Leaf, a mismatching Leaf (non-membership witness), or an Empty subtree (is_old0 case).

nodes.name: insert
nodes.summary: Inserts a (key, value) pair, allocating internal nodes along the descent and emitting an SMTResult with the old root, new root, sibling path, and any displaced leaf data.

nodes.name: update
nodes.summary: Updates the value at an existing key, recomputing the affected subtree hashes and emitting the SMTResult required by the SMT update circuit.

nodes.name: get_proof
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen entry point that runs find() on the WasmSparseMerkleTree and packages the result plus the current root into an SMTProof suitable for the ASP circuits.

nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Common prover-side serializable types: the Groth16Proof bytes triple (A, B, C), and the CircuitInputs / InputValue builder used to feed signals to the Circom witness calculator.

nodes.name: Groth16Proof
nodes.summary: Serializable Groth16 proof carrying the G1 point A, the G2 point B, and the G1 point C as raw byte vectors, with helpers to concatenate them as [A||B||C].

nodes.name: CircuitInputs
nodes.summary: Ordered map of signal-name to InputValue used to build the JSON input object passed to the Circom witness generator.

nodes.name: InputValue
nodes.summary: Tagged union of either a Single(hex String) or an Array(Vec<hex String>) field element value for a circuit input signal.

nodes.name: crypto.rs
nodes.summary: Pure-Rust cryptographic primitives for the privacy pool: Poseidon2 hashing (two- and three-input), public-key derivation, note commitment, signature, and nullifier computation, plus ASP membership leaf hashing matching the Circom circuits.
nodes.languageNotes: no_std Rust using ark-bn254 Fr (Scalar) types; mirrors the constraint logic of the Circom circuits exactly.

nodes.name: poseidon2_hash2
nodes.summary: Public byte-oriented wrapper that hashes two field-encoded byte slices with Poseidon2 under a domain separation tag and returns the digest as little-endian bytes.

nodes.name: derive_public_key
nodes.summary: Derives a Poseidon2-based note public key from a private-key byte string, mirroring the circuit's pubkey derivation gadget.

nodes.name: compute_commitment
nodes.summary: Computes Poseidon2(amount, public_key, blinding) as the note commitment used as the leaf in the pool Merkle tree.

nodes.name: compute_signature
nodes.summary: Computes the Poseidon2-based signature over (private_key, commitment, merkle_path) used to authorize spending and bind nullifier derivation.

nodes.name: compute_nullifier
nodes.summary: Derives the nullifier as Poseidon2(commitment, path_indices, signature), producing the unique spend marker stored on-chain to prevent double-spending.

nodes.name: asp_membership_leaf
nodes.summary: Computes the ASP (Anti-Subversion Pool) membership-list leaf as Poseidon2(note_pubkey, membership_blinding), supporting privacy-pool compliance proofs.

nodes.name: encryption.rs
nodes.summary: ECIES-style note encryption using X25519 + XSalsa20-Poly1305: derives spending/encryption/note keypairs from Stellar signatures, encrypts and decrypts on-chain note payloads, and generates random blinding factors.
nodes.languageNotes: Hybrid keying: SHA-256 of a deterministic signature seeds StaticSecret (X25519) for encryption keys, and a separate signature reduced modulo the BN254 scalar field seeds the note (spending) private key.

nodes.name: derive_encryption_and_note_keypairs
nodes.summary: Top-level deterministic derivation of both the note (BN254) keypair and the X25519 encryption keypair from two Stellar signatures (spending + encryption).

nodes.name: derive_keypair_from_signature
nodes.summary: SHA-256 hashes a Stellar signature to a 32-byte X25519 StaticSecret and returns the matching X25519 PublicKey as the encryption keypair.

nodes.name: derive_note_private_key
nodes.summary: SHA-256 hashes the spending signature and reduces modulo the BN254 scalar field to produce the deterministic note private key used in commitments.

nodes.name: generate_random_blinding
nodes.summary: Generates a uniformly random BN254-scalar blinding factor using getrandom, returning it as a Field value safe to use inside the pool.

nodes.name: encrypt_output_note
nodes.summary: Packs (amount, blinding) into a 48-byte plaintext and encrypts it to the recipient's encryption public key for inclusion in on-chain commitment events.

nodes.name: decrypt_output_note
nodes.summary: Attempts to decrypt an on-chain encrypted output and unpack it into (NoteAmount, blinding Field); returns Ok(None) when the ciphertext is not addressed to this recipient.

nodes.name: encrypt_note_data
nodes.summary: Low-level ECIES encryption: generates an ephemeral X25519 secret, performs Diffie-Hellman with the recipient pubkey, and encrypts plaintext with XSalsa20-Poly1305 under the resulting shared secret.

nodes.name: decrypt_note_data
nodes.summary: Low-level ECIES decryption: reconstructs the shared secret from the embedded ephemeral pubkey and the receiver's StaticSecret, then verifies and decrypts the XSalsa20-Poly1305 ciphertext.

nodes.name: flows.rs
nodes.summary: High-level transaction flow builders for the privacy pool: deposit, withdraw, transfer, and the underlying transact() that assembles all Circom circuit inputs (inputs, outputs, nullifiers, commitments, ASP roots, ext-data hash) into a ready-to-prove witness.
nodes.languageNotes: Single transact() function exceeds 350 lines and encodes the canonical wiring between business-level transaction params and the circuit's signal layout.

nodes.name: TransactInputNote
nodes.summary: Plaintext input note bundle (amount, blinding, merkle path) consumed by transact() to construct nullifier and commitment witness data.

nodes.name: TransactOutput
nodes.summary: Plaintext output bundle (amount, blinding, recipient note pubkey, recipient encryption pubkey) used to build new commitments and encrypted outputs.

nodes.name: PreparedTx
nodes.summary: Snapshot of the canonical public values for a built transaction (pool root, nullifiers, commitments, public amount, ext-data hash, ASP roots) used to verify the proof on-chain.

nodes.name: TransactArtifacts
nodes.summary: Result of building a transaction: the Circom circuit inputs, the external-data payload, and the PreparedTx snapshot for verification.

nodes.name: TransactParams
nodes.summary: Full parameter set for the low-level transact() entry point, including keys, pool root, ext recipient/amount, inputs, outputs, ASP membership/non-membership proofs, and tree depths.

nodes.name: DepositParams
nodes.summary: Caller-facing parameter struct for deposit flows, carrying the deposit amount, recipient outputs, and ASP membership/non-membership inputs.

nodes.name: WithdrawParams
nodes.summary: Caller-facing parameter struct for withdraw flows, including the recipient address, amount to leave the pool, and the spending inputs/outputs.

nodes.name: TransferParams
nodes.summary: Caller-facing parameter struct for in-pool transfers (no external value movement), carrying inputs, outputs, and ASP proofs.

nodes.name: deposit
nodes.summary: Builds the circuit inputs for a deposit: zero inputs, ext_amount equal to the deposit value, and a single output owned by the depositor, then delegates to transact().

nodes.name: withdraw
nodes.summary: Builds the circuit inputs for a withdrawal: consumes user inputs, computes change, sets negative ext_amount equal to the withdraw value, and delegates to transact().

nodes.name: transfer
nodes.summary: Builds the circuit inputs for an in-pool transfer with ext_amount = 0 and delegates to transact() to assemble the final witness.

nodes.name: transact
nodes.summary: Core circuit-input builder that validates parameters, computes commitments/signatures/nullifiers for inputs and outputs, encrypts outputs, packs ASP membership/non-membership witnesses, and emits the full CircuitInputs alongside ext-data and PreparedTx.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: no_std crate root for the browser-side prover module that re-exports all submodules (crypto, encryption, flows, merkle, notes, prover, r1cs, serialization, sparse_merkle, types).
nodes.languageNotes: Declared #![no_std] with extern crate alloc to support WebAssembly browser builds.

nodes.name: merkle.rs
nodes.summary: Poseidon2-hashed binary Merkle tree implementation (incremental prefix tree) used as the pool commitment tree, providing root computation and Merkle inclusion proofs that match the Circom circuits.

nodes.name: MerkleProof
nodes.summary: Inclusion proof bundle containing the sibling path elements, path indices, root, and tree levels needed by the circuit to verify pool-membership.

nodes.name: MerklePrefixTree
nodes.summary: Unbuilt Merkle prefix tree carrying the leaves and precomputed empty-subtree roots for each level; can be built into a queryable MerklePrefixTreeBuilt.

nodes.name: MerklePrefixTreeBuilt
nodes.summary: Built Merkle prefix tree holding all level hashes; exposes leaf_count, root, and proof(index) for inclusion-proof generation.

nodes.name: build_from_parts
nodes.summary: Builds the full Merkle tree level-by-level by hashing sibling pairs with Poseidon2 compression, padding missing siblings with the precomputed empty subtree root for that level.

nodes.name: proof
nodes.summary: Constructs a MerkleProof for a given leaf index, walking up the levels to collect siblings and packing path indices into a little-endian field element matching the circuit's encoding.

nodes.name: notes.rs
nodes.summary: Note discovery helper that attempts to decrypt an on-chain encrypted output, verifies the resulting amount/blinding match the claimed commitment, and derives the expected nullifier for the recipient.

nodes.name: DerivedUserNote
nodes.summary: Data derived from a decryptable pool commitment for a specific user: the note amount, blinding, and expected on-chain nullifier.

nodes.name: try_decrypt_and_derive_user_note
nodes.summary: Attempts to decrypt a pool commitment's encrypted output for a user's keypair; on success verifies the recomputed commitment matches and derives the expected nullifier, returning Ok(None) for non-owned, mismatched, or dummy zero-amount notes.

nodes.name: prover.rs
nodes.summary: Groth16 prover/verifier wrapper around arkworks ark-groth16 with the Circom reduction: loads compressed proving keys and R1CS, satisfies the R1CSCircuit with a witness, and produces both compressed and uncompressed (Soroban-friendly) proof byte layouts.
nodes.languageNotes: Builds proofs over BN254 using CircomReduction so witnesses and verifying keys are interoperable with Circom-generated artifacts.

nodes.name: R1CSCircuit
nodes.summary: Constraint-system adapter that wires the parsed R1CS plus a witness into an arkworks ConstraintSynthesizer for ark-groth16.

nodes.name: Prover
nodes.summary: Stateful Groth16 prover holding a deserialized proving key, processed verifying key, and R1CS; exposes prove/verify and helpers to extract public inputs and convert proofs into Soroban-uncompressed bytes.

nodes.name: generate_constraints
nodes.summary: ConstraintSynthesizer implementation that allocates public-input and witness variables from the witness vector and enforces every R1CS constraint via cs.enforce_r1cs_constraint.

nodes.name: Prover::new
nodes.summary: Constructor that deserializes a compressed BN254 proving key, parses the R1CS, validates the public-input count, and pre-processes the verifying key.

nodes.name: prove
nodes.summary: Reads a witness byte buffer, satisfies the R1CSCircuit, runs Groth16 proving with CircomReduction, and returns a compressed Groth16Proof.

nodes.name: prove_bytes_uncompressed
nodes.summary: Same as prove() but returns the proof in the uncompressed (A || B || C) big-endian byte layout that the Soroban BLS12-381 verifier contracts expect.

nodes.name: extract_public_inputs
nodes.summary: Pulls the public-input slice out of the witness byte buffer using the proving key's known public-input count.

nodes.name: verify
nodes.summary: Deserializes a compressed proof and public inputs, then runs Groth16 verify_with_processed_vk against the prover's processed verifying key.

nodes.name: verify_proof
nodes.summary: Standalone Groth16 verifier that does not require a Prover instance: takes a verifying key, proof, and public inputs as bytes and returns whether the proof is valid.

nodes.name: client.rs
nodes.summary: Main-thread WebClient exposed to JavaScript via wasm-bindgen; orchestrates ZK proof flows (deposit/withdraw/transfer/transact) by coordinating the storage and prover web workers and fetching on-chain Stellar contract data.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of wasm-bindgen #[wasm_bindgen] exports and gloo-worker bridge handles to dispatch requests into spawned web workers; futures combined with TimeoutFuture for browser-side timeouts.

nodes.name: config.rs
nodes.summary: Small runtime configuration holder exposing the Stellar RPC URL to the rest of the web crate.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root and wasm entry point: declares the public submodules, defines main_thread which boots the WebClient, initializes the indexer, and starts the polling sync loop.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Box::leak to obtain a 'static reference to the parsed contract config for the singleton WebClient.

nodes.name: protocol.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the serde-serialized request/response message protocol exchanged between the main thread and the storage/prover web workers, including per-flow params for Deposit, Withdraw, Transfer, and Transact.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of #[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")] for JS interop and tagged enums to encode worker requests/responses.

nodes.name: workers.rs
nodes.summary: Module barrel that re-exports the prover and storage worker submodules.

nodes.name: prover.rs
nodes.summary: Web worker that fetches and SHA-256-verifies the Circom circuit artifacts (R1CS, witness WASM), initializes the WitnessCalculator and Groth16 Prover, and serves proving requests for each ZK flow.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses thread_local! cells to cache the WitnessCalculator and Prover singletons inside the dedicated worker; fetches artifacts over fetch() from the worker global scope.

nodes.name: storage.rs
nodes.summary: Web worker that owns the OPFS-backed SQLite database, indexes chain events, derives user keys, and assembles the per-flow inputs (membership proofs, Merkle paths, outputs) handed to the prover worker.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses sqlite-wasm-rs over the OPFS SAH-pool VFS; runs a futures::mpsc-driven background processor loop for note decryption.

nodes.name: WebClient
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-exported facade combining a storage worker bridge, a prover worker bridge, and a CoreStateFetcher; the JavaScript app calls all proof and storage operations through this single handle.

nodes.name: Config
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-exported configuration struct holding the Stellar RPC URL used by the WebClient and indexer.

nodes.name: MainThreadHandle
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen handle returned to JavaScript from main_thread; lets the host retrieve a clone of the WebClient.

nodes.name: UserKeys
nodes.summary: Container bundling a user's note keypair and encryption keypair for transport over the worker boundary.

nodes.name: StorageWorkerRequest
nodes.summary: Tagged enum of every request the main thread can send to the storage worker, covering syncing, key derivation, user notes, disclaimers, and per-flow input preparation.

nodes.name: StorageWorkerResponse
nodes.summary: Tagged enum of every response the storage worker returns to the main thread, paired one-for-one with StorageWorkerRequest variants.

nodes.name: ProverWorkerRequest
nodes.summary: Tagged enum of requests dispatched to the prover worker (Ping plus the four ZK flows: Deposit, Withdraw, Transfer, Transact).

nodes.name: ProverWorkerResponse
nodes.summary: Tagged enum of prover worker responses, returning either a prepared transaction per flow or an error.

nodes.name: DepositRequest
nodes.summary: Payload describing all storage-derived inputs needed to build a deposit proof: amounts, roots, ASP membership context, and the non-membership proof.

nodes.name: WithdrawRequest
nodes.summary: Payload for the storage worker when assembling withdraw inputs, including the recipient, input commitments, and ASP/pool Merkle state.

nodes.name: TransferRequest
nodes.summary: Payload for a private intra-pool transfer: source notes, output amounts, recipient note and encryption pubkeys, and ASP context.

nodes.name: TransactRequest
nodes.summary: General-purpose transact payload combining external deposit/withdraw amount with internal input and output notes and per-output recipient keys.

nodes.name: PreparedTxPublic
nodes.summary: Public inputs section of a prepared transaction, exposing pool root, nullifiers, commitments, and ASP membership/non-membership roots.

nodes.name: PreparedProverTx
nodes.summary: Final prover output: uncompressed Groth16 proof bytes, on-chain external data, and the prepared public inputs.

nodes.name: InitState
nodes.summary: Tri-state enum tracking whether the OPFS/SQLite-backed storage has finished initializing or failed (e.g., because another tab holds the OPFS lock).

nodes.name: emit_progress
nodes.summary: Builds a JS status object (flow, stage, optional message, current/total) and invokes the user-supplied JS callback so the UI can render proof progress.

nodes.name: new
nodes.summary: Constructs a WebClient by spawning the storage and prover module workers and wiring up the on-chain state fetcher.

nodes.name: prove_deposit_inner
nodes.summary: Full deposit pipeline: validates outputs, fetches pool/ASP state, builds the ASP non-membership proof, asks storage for deposit params, waits for ledger sync, then sends the request to the prover worker.

nodes.name: prove_withdraw_inner
nodes.summary: Full withdraw pipeline: parses input note IDs, fetches pool and ASP state, gathers user keys, builds the non-membership proof, requests withdraw params from storage, then drives the prover worker.

nodes.name: prove_transfer_inner
nodes.summary: Full private intra-pool transfer pipeline: parses recipient note/encryption keys, gathers inputs, builds ASP proofs, asks storage to assemble transfer params, then dispatches the prover.

nodes.name: prove_transact_inner
nodes.summary: General transact pipeline supporting arbitrary combinations of external and internal flows; parses per-output recipient keys, builds storage/transact params, and runs the prover.

nodes.name: derive_save_user_keys
nodes.summary: Asks the storage worker to derive and persist the user's note and encryption keypairs from the two signature messages, returning the resulting UserKeys.

nodes.name: derive_asp_user_leaf
nodes.summary: Derives the ASP membership leaf hash for a given membership blinding and note pubkey hex; used by the operator UI to issue an allowlist entry.

nodes.name: prove_deposit
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-exported deposit entry point that forwards to prove_deposit_inner and wraps errors with stage context.

nodes.name: prove_withdraw
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-exported withdraw entry point that forwards to prove_withdraw_inner and wraps errors with stage context.

nodes.name: prove_transfer
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-exported transfer entry point that forwards to prove_transfer_inner and wraps errors with stage context.

nodes.name: prove_transact
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen-exported transact entry point that forwards to prove_transact_inner and wraps errors with stage context.

nodes.name: save_sync_progress
nodes.summary: Persists indexer cursor metadata into the storage worker so the next page-load can resume from the same Stellar ledger.

nodes.name: main_thread
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen entry point invoked from JavaScript: parses contract config, constructs the WebClient, pings storage, initializes the indexer, and starts the polling loop.

nodes.name: start_indexer_loop
nodes.summary: Spawns a never-ending local task that polls the indexer for new contract events every interval_ms milliseconds.

nodes.name: load_circuit_artifacts
nodes.summary: Fetches the R1CS, witness WASM, and graph artifacts, verifies their SHA-256 against the embedded expected hashes, and installs a WitnessCalculator and Prover into thread_local cells.
nodes.languageNotes: Verifies artifact integrity before constructing the Prover to defend against tampered circuit downloads.

nodes.name: router
nodes.summary: Dispatches incoming ProverWorkerRequest variants to the matching flow function (deposit/withdraw/transfer/transact) and wraps the proof result in the appropriate prepared response.

nodes.name: prove_from_artifacts
nodes.summary: Runs the Circom witness computation, generates a Groth16 proof with the cached Prover, verifies it, and converts the proof bytes to the uncompressed Stellar-friendly format.

nodes.name: fetch_circuit_file
nodes.summary: Worker-scope fetch helper that resolves the deployment public URL, issues a CORS-permitted GET, and returns the response bytes as a Vec<u8>.

nodes.name: ensure_sha256_matches
nodes.summary: Verifies that a downloaded artifact's length and SHA-256 hash match the values pinned at build time; rejects with a descriptive JsError on mismatch.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes the SQLite OPFS SAH-pool VFS, connects the storage layer, surfaces a friendly error when another tab holds the OPFS lock, and kicks off the background note-decryption processor.

nodes.name: router
nodes.summary: Massive request router that handles every StorageWorkerRequest variant: persistence, key derivation, disclaimer, user notes, and per-flow input assembly (deposit/withdraw/transfer/transact params).

nodes.name: build_membership_proof
nodes.summary: Loads the ASP membership Merkle leaves, constructs a MerklePrefixTree at the requested depth, locates the user's leaf, and returns either a proof or a SyncRequired signal.

nodes.name: build_pool_inputs
nodes.summary: Looks up the user's unspent notes for the requested input commitments, rebuilds the pool Merkle tree, and produces the per-input note + Merkle proof tuples for the prover.

nodes.name: load_user_key_material
nodes.summary: Retrieves the persisted user note and encryption keypairs from local storage and reconstitutes them into runtime types.

nodes.name: process_until_empty
nodes.summary: Background processor that walks the unprocessed-events queue, attempts to decrypt each note with the user's encryption key, persists user-owned notes, and yields between iterations to keep the browser responsive.

nodes.name: worker_main
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen worker entry point that registers the StorageWorker with gloo-worker and triggers async initialization.

nodes.name: worker_main
nodes.summary: wasm-bindgen worker entry point that registers the ProverWorker with gloo-worker and triggers async artifact loading.

nodes.name: contract_state.rs
nodes.summary: Fetches and parses on-chain Soroban contract state for privacy pools and ASP membership/non-membership trees, and builds simulation transactions to retrieve SMT non-membership proofs from the ASP contract.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of Stellar XDR ScVal conversions and bulk contract data RPC calls; performs root-drift consistency checking across multiple pools.

nodes.name: StateFetcher
nodes.summary: Orchestrator that bulk-reads contract storage for all enabled pools plus ASP membership/non-membership contracts and aggregates them into a consistent typed snapshot.

nodes.name: ParsedFindResult
nodes.summary: Internal struct holding the parsed result of the ASP `find_key` simulation, including siblings, found flag, and not-found leaf metadata.

nodes.name: OnchainProofPublicInputs
nodes.summary: Public input bundle for the on-chain Groth16 verifier (root, nullifiers, output commitments, ASP roots, ext data hash, public amount).

nodes.name: PreparedSorobanTx
nodes.summary: Container for a Soroban transaction XDR plus its associated authorization entries, ready for signing and submission.

nodes.name: contracts_data
nodes.summary: Performs a two-phase bulk fetch of contract storage for all enabled pools and ASP contracts, validates root index drift, and assembles a list of typed contract states.

nodes.name: get_nonmembership_proof
nodes.summary: Builds and simulates a `find_key` call against the ASP non-membership SMT contract, parses the result, and pads siblings to the configured SMT depth.

nodes.name: build_invoke_contract_tx_envelope
nodes.summary: Constructs a Soroban `InvokeHostFunction` transaction envelope for a contract call with the given function name, args, and authorization entries.

nodes.name: parse_find_result
nodes.summary: Decodes the SMT `find_key` return value into a ParsedFindResult, accepting both snake_case and camelCase field naming from the contract.

nodes.name: u256_to_i128_checked
nodes.summary: Safely narrows a U256 to i128, returning an error when the value would overflow the signed 128-bit range.

nodes.name: build_find_key_simulation_tx
nodes.summary: Builds a transaction envelope used solely for RPC simulation of the SMT `find_key` host function.

nodes.name: field_to_scval_u256
nodes.summary: Encodes a circuit field element as a Stellar XDR `ScVal::U256` by splitting its 32-byte big-endian representation into four u64 limbs.

nodes.name: conversions.rs
nodes.summary: Conversion helpers between Stellar XDR `ScVal` types and primitive Rust types (U256, u32, u64, bool, address strings) plus parsing of contract event metadata.

nodes.name: ParsedContractEvent
nodes.summary: Normalized representation of a parsed Soroban contract event with id, ledger, contract id, name, topics, and value map.

nodes.name: scval_to_address_string
nodes.summary: Converts an `ScVal::Address` into the corresponding strkey-encoded account or contract address string.

nodes.name: scval_to_u256
nodes.summary: Reconstructs a primitive_types::U256 from a Stellar `ScVal::U256` by recombining its four 64-bit limbs with overflow-checked arithmetic.

nodes.name: parse_event_metadata
nodes.summary: Parses a raw Soroban event into a ParsedContractEvent, extracting the event name from topic[0] and decoding the value map fields into a HashMap.

nodes.name: ext_data_hash.rs
nodes.summary: Computes the off-chain ext-data keccak256 hash bound into a privacy pool transaction proof, reducing the digest modulo the BN254 scalar field to match circuit semantics.
nodes.languageNotes: Reduces the Keccak digest modulo the BN254 field to keep the hash representable as a circuit field element.

nodes.name: hash_ext_data_offchain
nodes.summary: Serializes ext data fields into a sorted ScMap, XDR-encodes it, hashes with Keccak256, and reduces the digest modulo the BN254 scalar field for circuit compatibility.

nodes.name: indexer.rs
nodes.summary: Stellar RPC event indexer that polls contract events from configured privacy pool and ASP contracts, persisting batches and per-contract sync cursors through a pluggable storage trait.

nodes.name: Indexer
nodes.summary: Holds the RPC client, storage backend, and tracked contract ids used to incrementally fetch and persist contract events.

nodes.name: ContractDataStorage
nodes.summary: Trait abstraction over event/sync-state persistence with methods for reading sync state, saving event batches, and updating sync progress.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Constructs an Indexer by validating that the RPC node retains history back to the earliest tracked pool deployment ledger, returning an error otherwise.

nodes.name: fetch_contract_events
nodes.summary: Pages forward through Stellar RPC contract events for all tracked contracts, persists each batch, and advances a shared sync cursor with consistency checks across contracts.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for the `stellar` core crate that wires up RPC, conversions, indexer, contract state fetcher, and ext-data hashing submodules and re-exports their public surface.

nodes.name: rpc.rs
nodes.summary: Minimal Stellar Soroban JSON-RPC client built on reqwest, supporting `getEvents`, `getLedgerEntries`, bulk contract-data reads, and transaction simulation with timeout handling.
nodes.languageNotes: Pairs reqwest with gloo_timers via futures::select to provide WASM-compatible timeout semantics for in-browser proving flows.

nodes.name: Error
nodes.summary: Unified error enum covering RPC transport, JSON-RPC, XDR, address parsing, and consistency errors raised by the Stellar client.

nodes.name: Client
nodes.summary: Stellar Soroban JSON-RPC client that wraps a reqwest HTTP client, base URL, and timeout for issuing typed requests against Stellar RPC endpoints.

nodes.name: Event
nodes.summary: Raw Stellar contract event record returned by `getEvents`, including ledger/tx context, XDR topic/value blobs, and operation indices.

nodes.name: GetEventsResponse
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC response shape for `getEvents` including the events slice, latest/oldest ledger metadata, and the pagination cursor.

nodes.name: SimulateTransactionResponse
nodes.summary: JSON-RPC response shape for `simulateTransaction`, exposing the host function result(s), transaction data, and minimum resource fee.

nodes.name: EventStart
nodes.summary: Sum type for the start position of a `getEvents` request (single ledger, ledger range, or cursor).

nodes.name: rpc_call
nodes.summary: Generic JSON-RPC POST helper with per-call timeout that serializes a request, races it against a timer, and decodes the typed result or error.

nodes.name: get_contract_events
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper around `getEvents` for contract events, handling cursor vs ledger start positions and translating RPC sync-gap errors.

nodes.name: get_events
nodes.summary: Low-level `getEvents` JSON-RPC call that assembles filters (type, topics, contract ids) and pagination parameters before delegating to `rpc_call`.

nodes.name: with_timeout
nodes.summary: Constructs a Client by normalizing the base URL (defaulting the port for http/https) and building a reqwest client with the given timeout.

nodes.name: build_contract_data_key_specs
nodes.summary: Builds the XDR `LedgerKey::ContractData` entries required to bulk-read a contract's enum-only and valued storage keys via `getLedgerEntries`.

nodes.name: get_contract_data_bulk
nodes.summary: Chunked bulk read of multiple contracts' storage keys via `getLedgerEntries`, deduplicating XDR keys and validating that all required keys are present.

nodes.name: get_ledger_entries
nodes.summary: Calls the Stellar RPC `getLedgerEntries` method with a list of XDR-encoded ledger keys.

nodes.name: simulate_transaction
nodes.summary: Calls the Stellar RPC `simulateTransaction` method with an XDR-encoded transaction envelope.

nodes.name: race_with_timeout
nodes.summary: WASM-compatible timeout helper that races an arbitrary future against a `TimeoutFuture`, mapping timer expiry to `Error::Timeout`.

nodes.name: parse_ledger_range
nodes.summary: Best-effort parser that extracts a numeric ledger range from a Stellar RPC sync-gap error message string.

nodes.name: disclaimer.rs
nodes.summary: Embeds the current disclaimer markdown text and includes the build-script-generated disclaimer hash constant for acceptance tracking.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses include_str! to embed the markdown at compile time and include! with OUT_DIR to pull in a build.rs-generated hash constant.

nodes.name: events_parsers.rs
nodes.summary: Decodes raw Soroban ContractEvents (pool nullifiers/commitments/public keys and ASP membership leaf operations) into strongly-typed ProcessedEvent variants by converting ScVal topics and values into Field, u32, and byte representations.
nodes.languageNotes: Each parser destructures a ParsedContractEvent and converts ScVal payloads via scval_to_* helpers from the stellar crate; unknown event names return an anyhow error.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for the core state library; wires up the disclaimer, events_parsers, processor, and storage modules and re-exports the public surface (Storage, processors, disclaimer constants).
nodes.languageNotes: Rust crate root using `mod` to declare submodules and `pub use` to flatten the public API for downstream crates.

nodes.name: processor.rs
nodes.summary: High-level orchestration over Storage: pulls unprocessed raw contract events, parses them, batches them into typed tables, and drives note scanning plus nullifier reconciliation for user accounts.

nodes.name: storage.rs
nodes.summary: SQLite-backed persistence layer for the privacy pool indexer: manages a migrated `poolstellar.sqlite` database holding raw events, parsed nullifiers/commitments/public-keys, ASP membership leaves, account keypairs, disclaimer acceptances, and derived user notes, with helpers for ASP-membership preconditions and note reconciliation.
nodes.languageNotes: Built on rusqlite + rusqlite-migration with a single schema.sql migration; designed to run both natively and inside WASM/OPFS, so the DB filename is intentionally frozen as `poolstellar.sqlite`.

nodes.name: parse_event
nodes.summary: Dispatch function that inspects a Soroban ContractEvent's name and routes it to the appropriate typed parser (nullifier, commitment, public key, or ASP membership leaf operations).

nodes.name: parse_new_nullifier_event
nodes.summary: Decodes a NewNullifierEvent by reading the nullifier U256 from the first topic of the parsed Soroban event.

nodes.name: parse_new_commitment_event
nodes.summary: Decodes a NewCommitmentEvent into commitment Field, leaf index u32, and encrypted_output bytes from a parsed pool contract event.

nodes.name: parse_public_key_event
nodes.summary: Decodes a PublicKeyEvent containing the owner address plus the user's encryption_key and note_key byte arrays for note discovery.

nodes.name: parse_leaf_added
nodes.summary: Decodes an ASP-membership LeafAdded event into leaf field, index, and post-insert merkle root for membership tree tracking.

nodes.name: parse_leaf_inserted
nodes.summary: Decodes a LeafInserted event from an ASP non-membership sparse merkle tree into key, value, and resulting root fields.

nodes.name: parse_leaf_updated
nodes.summary: Decodes a LeafUpdated event from the ASP non-membership tree carrying the key, previous value, new value, and updated merkle root.

nodes.name: parse_leaf_deleted
nodes.summary: Decodes a LeafDeleted event from the ASP non-membership tree into the deleted key and the resulting post-deletion root.

nodes.name: process_events
nodes.summary: Pops a bounded batch of unprocessed raw events from Storage, parses each via parse_event, classifies into per-type buckets, and persists each bucket through Storage batch save methods, returning whether work was done.

nodes.name: process_notes
nodes.summary: Drives per-user note discovery by scanning pool commitments for decryptable outputs and reconciling pool nullifiers against locally-derived expected nullifiers via the provided derive closure.

nodes.name: Storage
nodes.summary: Primary persistence facade wrapping a rusqlite Connection; exposes typed methods for events, keypairs, disclaimer acceptances, ASP membership preconditions, pool activity queries, and user note reconciliation.

nodes.name: DisclaimerState
nodes.summary: Snapshot DTO describing the current disclaimer text, its hex hash, and whether the queried account has accepted that exact version.

nodes.name: AccountKeys
nodes.summary: Bundles an account row id with its latest note keypair and encryption keypair for use during commitment scanning and nullifier derivation.

nodes.name: PoolCommitmentRow
nodes.summary: Row representation of a pool commitment containing its database id, commitment field, leaf index, and the encrypted output blob to be decrypted by recipients.

nodes.name: DerivedUserNoteRow
nodes.summary: Output of the user-side note derivation step: the recovered note amount, blinding factor, and expected nullifier used later for spend reconciliation.

nodes.name: save_events_batch
nodes.summary: Persists a batch of raw indexed contract events inside a single SQLite transaction, resolving each event's contract address to an internal contract_id.

nodes.name: save_sync_progress
nodes.summary: Records indexer sync metadata (last seen ledger, fully-indexed flag) per contract within a transaction so resumed sync sessions can pick up where they left off.

nodes.name: get_sync_metadata
nodes.summary: Returns per-contract sync progress rows used by the indexer to decide where to resume scanning each tracked contract.

nodes.name: get_user_keys
nodes.summary: Returns the most recent note and encryption keypairs for a given account address, joining the keypairs table against accounts.

nodes.name: save_encryption_and_note_keypairs
nodes.summary: Atomically inserts (or upserts) a new encryption + note keypair pair for the given Stellar address, creating the account row on demand inside one transaction.

nodes.name: get_disclaimer_state
nodes.summary: Looks up whether the given account has accepted the current disclaimer hash and returns a DisclaimerState carrying the current text, hash, and acceptance flag.

nodes.name: accept_current_disclaimer
nodes.summary: Records the account's acceptance of the current disclaimer hash via INSERT OR IGNORE so re-acceptance is idempotent.

nodes.name: get_or_create_account
nodes.summary: Helper that ensures an `accounts` row exists for the given Stellar address and returns its primary key, used by other transactional writers.

nodes.name: get_or_create_contract_id
nodes.summary: Helper that upserts a contract address into the `contracts` table and returns the internal contract_id used as a foreign key across event tables.

nodes.name: get_recent_public_keys
nodes.summary: Returns the most recently observed PublicKey events ordered by ledger desc, used by the UI to display who has registered note keys recently.

nodes.name: list_user_notes
nodes.summary: Returns a paginated list of decrypted user notes for the given account address, including unspent/spent status for wallet UI display.

nodes.name: get_recent_pool_activity
nodes.summary: Aggregates recent pool ledger activity (counts of nullifiers, commitments, and ledgers) for explorer-style dashboards over a bounded ledger window.

nodes.name: get_pool_commitment_leaves_ordered
nodes.summary: Returns all pool commitment leaves for a given pool contract in strictly ascending leaf-index order, verifying contiguity so callers can reconstruct the deterministic merkle tree.

nodes.name: get_unspent_user_note_by_commitment
nodes.summary: Looks up a specific unspent note (amount, blinding, leaf index) by its commitment for the given pool and account, used when constructing spend proofs.

nodes.name: save_nullifier_events_batch
nodes.summary: Persists a batch of parsed NewNullifierEvents (linking each to its source raw event) inside a single transaction.

nodes.name: save_commitment_events_batch
nodes.summary: Persists a batch of parsed NewCommitmentEvents (commitment, leaf index, encrypted output) inside a transaction for later note scanning.

nodes.name: save_public_key_events_batch
nodes.summary: Persists a batch of parsed PublicKeyEvents tying each owner address to its encryption_key and note_key bytes.

nodes.name: save_leaf_added_events_batch
nodes.summary: Persists a batch of ASP-membership LeafAdded events (leaf, index, root) into the membership table within one transaction.

nodes.name: check_asp_membership_precondition
nodes.summary: Validates that the user's leaf is currently in the ASP membership tree at the latest known root, ensuring the indexer has caught up before producing spend proofs that depend on membership.

nodes.name: get_all_asp_membership_leaves_ordered
nodes.summary: Returns all ASP membership leaves for a given contract in deterministic order, verifying contiguity so callers can rebuild the membership merkle tree client-side.

nodes.name: get_unprocessed_events
nodes.summary: Returns a bounded batch of raw indexed events that have not yet been parsed into typed tables, used by the processor's outer loop.

nodes.name: get_accounts_with_latest_keypairs
nodes.summary: Returns every locally known account paired with its most recent note and encryption keypair, used to seed per-account commitment scanning.

nodes.name: scan_commitments_for_user_notes
nodes.summary: Iterates unprocessed pool commitments per account, invokes the caller-provided derive closure (which attempts decryption of the encrypted_output), and stores any recovered user notes with their expected nullifiers.

nodes.name: reconcile_nullifiers
nodes.summary: Matches observed on-chain nullifiers against locally derived expected nullifiers, marking the corresponding user notes as spent so wallet balances stay consistent.

nodes.name: amounts.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the core amount and BN254 field-element wrappers (NoteAmount, ExtAmount, Field) used throughout the prover, witness builder, and circuit-input pipeline, including modular arithmetic, serde, hex, and rusqlite conversions.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements custom modular arithmetic over BN254 scalar field using a uint::construct_uint U256 backing type; exposes the standard Add/Sub/Neg operator set plus checked variants, and bridges signed ExtAmount to circuit field elements via the FE(x) = x or p - |x| mapping.

nodes.name: chain_data.rs
nodes.summary: Defines structs and enums mirroring on-chain Soroban state and contract events (pool info, ASP membership/non-membership trees, nullifier/commitment/leaf events) consumed by the indexer and state crates.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of serde rename_all = camelCase to match the RPC/JSON shape produced by the Stellar indexer; includes a private serde_0x_hex_32 helper module reused by key wrappers in lib.rs.

nodes.name: ext_data.rs
nodes.summary: Defines the ExtData struct mirroring the Soroban on-chain ExtData layout (recipient, signed ext_amount, two encrypted note outputs) used to compute extDataHash.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for core types: re-exports amounts/chain_data/ext_data and defines deployment configuration, ASP membership proof, user note (UTXO) representations, key wrappers (encryption and note keys), and shared 0x-hex parsing helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Acts as a barrel for the sibling modules; defines SMT_DEPTH constant and a family of 32-byte newtype key wrappers with bespoke serde and FromStr/parse implementations.

nodes.name: NoteAmount
nodes.summary: Non-negative u128 amount wrapper used inside encrypted notes, with checked arithmetic, serde string form, FromStr, Display, and rusqlite TEXT storage conversions.

nodes.name: ExtAmount
nodes.summary: Signed i128 amount wrapper for external pool flows (positive = deposit, negative = withdraw, zero = transfer), with checked add/sub/neg, serde string form, and rusqlite INTEGER storage conversions.

nodes.name: Field
nodes.summary: BN254 scalar field element backed by U256, providing modular Add/Sub, big/little-endian byte conversions, 0x-hex parsing/serialisation, lossless conversions from NoteAmount and signed ExtAmount, and rusqlite BLOB storage.
nodes.languageNotes: Centralises the signed-to-field mapping that must agree byte-for-byte with the JS prover and Circom circuit; all overflow paths use checked_* + expect to fail loudly on out-of-domain inputs.

nodes.name: ContractsStateData
nodes.summary: Aggregated on-chain state snapshot combining pool info plus ASP membership and non-membership tree state.

nodes.name: PoolInfo
nodes.summary: Live pool contract state including admin, token, verifier, attached ASP contracts, Merkle tree configuration, deposit cap, and commitment counters.

nodes.name: AspMembership
nodes.summary: On-chain state for the ASP membership Merkle tree contract: root, depth, next index, admin policy, and capacity bookkeeping.

nodes.name: AspNonMembership
nodes.summary: On-chain state for the ASP non-membership sparse-Merkle-tree contract: current root, emptiness flag, and admin.

nodes.name: AspNonMembershipProof
nodes.summary: Witness payload proving a key is absent from the ASP non-membership SMT, carrying old-key/value, siblings, and the root.

nodes.name: ContractEvent
nodes.summary: Raw contract event as fetched from the Stellar RPC indexer, with id, ledger, contract id, topics, and value payload.

nodes.name: ContractsEventData
nodes.summary: Paginated batch of contract events with a cursor and latest-ledger watermark.

nodes.name: SyncMetadata
nodes.summary: Per-contract sync bookkeeping: contract id, latest cursor, and last processed ledger.

nodes.name: AspMembershipSync
nodes.summary: Enum describing the user's ASP membership sync state: needs sync, must register, or already indexed at a known position.

nodes.name: NewNullifierEvent
nodes.summary: Decoded NewNullifier contract event carrying the spent-note nullifier field element.

nodes.name: NewCommitmentEvent
nodes.summary: Decoded NewCommitment event with commitment field element, leaf index, and the encrypted output blob for recipient scanning.

nodes.name: PublicKeyEvent
nodes.summary: Decoded PublicKey registration event linking a Stellar address to encryption and note public keys.

nodes.name: LeafAddedEvent
nodes.summary: Append-only Merkle tree leaf event with leaf value, insertion index, and the resulting root.

nodes.name: LeafInsertedEvent
nodes.summary: Sparse Merkle tree insertion event with key, value, and the new root.

nodes.name: LeafUpdatedEvent
nodes.summary: Sparse Merkle tree update event capturing key, old value, new value, and resulting root.

nodes.name: LeafDeletedEvent
nodes.summary: Sparse Merkle tree deletion event with key and post-deletion root.

nodes.name: ProcessedEvent
nodes.summary: Sum-type wrapper that the indexer emits after classifying a raw ContractEvent into nullifier, commitment, key, or leaf-tree variants.

nodes.name: ExtData
nodes.summary: Mirror of the Soroban on-chain ExtData struct (recipient, signed ext_amount, two encrypted outputs) used to compute extDataHash inside and outside the circuit.

nodes.name: ContractConfig
nodes.summary: Top-level deserialised shape of deployments/<network>/deployments.json, listing deployer/admin addresses, ASP and verifier contracts, and per-asset pool entries.

nodes.name: PoolConfigEntry
nodes.summary: Per-pool deployment entry capturing pool contract id, backing token contract id, deployment ledger anchor, enable flag, and asset descriptor.

nodes.name: AssetDescriptor
nodes.summary: Tagged enum describing the backing asset for a pool: native XLM, classic CODE:ISSUER asset, or Soroban contract token.

nodes.name: AspMembershipProof
nodes.summary: ASP membership proof payload (leaf, blinding, path elements, packed indices, root) wired straight into the Circom circuit as field elements.

nodes.name: UserNote
nodes.summary: Local representation of a UTXO-style note: owner address, spending private key, blinding, amount, leaf index, lifecycle ledgers, and spent/received flags.

nodes.name: PublicKeyEntry
nodes.summary: Address-to-public-keys mapping (encryption key + note key) with the ledger sequence at which it was registered.

nodes.name: UserNoteSummary
nodes.summary: Lightweight user-facing projection of UserNote suitable for listing notes in UI (id, amount, leaf index, creation ledger, spent flag).

nodes.name: PoolLedgerActivity
nodes.summary: Per-ledger activity slice for a pool, listing commitments and nullifiers that landed in that ledger.

nodes.name: EncryptionKeyPair
nodes.summary: Bundle of a user's encryption private and public keys used to encrypt/decrypt note payloads exchanged via on-chain events.

nodes.name: NoteKeyPair
nodes.summary: Bundle of a user's note spending private and public keys (Poseidon-domain) that authorise note spends inside the circuit.

nodes.name: parse_0x_hex_32
nodes.summary: Parses a 0x-prefixed 64-character hex string into a fixed [u8;32], validating length and hex decoding errors.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for the Soroban pool contract that wires together the Merkle tree, pool logic, and test modules into a no_std Soroban contract crate.
nodes.languageNotes: Rust no_std crate using Soroban contract attributes; aggregates submodules without exporting symbols itself.

nodes.name: merkle_with_history.rs
nodes.summary: Implements an append-only Merkle tree with a rolling history of recent roots, persisted in Soroban storage and hashed via Poseidon2 for ZK-friendly commitments.
nodes.languageNotes: Stores filled subtrees, zero leaves, and a sliding window of historical roots keyed by MerkleDataKey; uses U256 field elements over BN254.

nodes.name: pool.rs
nodes.summary: Main privacy pool Soroban contract handling shielded deposits, withdrawals, and transfers via Groth16 proof verification, nullifier tracking, and ASP membership/non-membership checks.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of soroban-sdk types (U256, I256, BytesN<32>); integrates with cross-contract clients (TokenClient, CircomGroth16VerifierClient, ASPMembershipClient) and emits topic-based events.

nodes.name: test.rs
nodes.summary: Unit test suite for the pool contract and Merkle tree, covering constructor wiring, root tracking, leaf insertion limits, and transact-path rejection cases for invalid root, bad ext hash, and bad public amount.

nodes.name: Error
nodes.summary: Contract error enum for the Merkle tree module, covering initialization, capacity, and overflow failure modes.

nodes.name: MerkleDataKey
nodes.summary: Soroban persistent storage key enum addressing tree levels, current root index, next leaf slot, filled subtrees, zero values, and the rolling root history.

nodes.name: MerkleTreeWithHistory
nodes.summary: Stateless Merkle-tree-with-history module exposing init, paired leaf insertion, root history lookup, and pair hashing operations against Soroban storage.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes the Merkle tree storage with the requested number of levels, seeding filled subtrees and zero values from the precomputed zero ladder and writing the initial root.

nodes.name: insert_two_leaves
nodes.summary: Inserts two leaves into the tree as a sibling pair, recomputing the path with Poseidon2 hashes up to the root and advancing the rolling root history index.

nodes.name: is_known_root
nodes.summary: Checks whether a given root appears in the recent root history, allowing slightly stale proofs to remain valid.

nodes.name: get_last_root
nodes.summary: Returns the most recently committed Merkle root from the rolling history buffer.

nodes.name: hash_pair
nodes.summary: Hashes a left/right BN254 field-element pair via Poseidon2 compression, used as the Merkle node hash function.

nodes.name: Error
nodes.summary: Pool contract error enum covering authorization, proof validity, nullifier reuse, root recognition, and arithmetic failure cases.

nodes.name: Proof
nodes.summary: Groth16 proof bundle carrying serialized proof bytes, root, input nullifiers, output commitments, public amount, ext-data hash, and ASP membership/non-membership roots.

nodes.name: ExtData
