nodes.summary: External transaction data carrying the recipient, signed ext amount, and the two encrypted note payloads associated with the output commitments.

nodes.name: Account
nodes.summary: Registration record binding an owner address to a public encryption key and a note key used by the privacy protocol.

nodes.name: ASPMembershipInterface
nodes.summary: Cross-contract trait declaring the ASP allowlist membership root accessor consumed via the auto-generated client.

nodes.name: ASPNonMembershipInterface
nodes.summary: Cross-contract trait declaring the ASP blocklist non-membership root accessor consumed via the auto-generated client.

nodes.name: CircomGroth16VerifierInterface
nodes.summary: Cross-contract trait for the Circom Groth16 verifier exposing a verify entrypoint that accepts a proof and public inputs as BN254 field elements.

nodes.name: DataKey
nodes.summary: Soroban storage key enum addressing the pool's admin, token, verifier, deposit cap, nullifier map, and ASP contract addresses.

nodes.name: NewCommitmentEvent
nodes.summary: Topic-based Soroban event emitted whenever a new output commitment is inserted into the Merkle tree, carrying its index and encrypted note payload.

nodes.name: NewNullifierEvent
nodes.summary: Topic-based Soroban event emitted whenever an input nullifier is marked as spent.

nodes.name: PublicKeyEvent
nodes.summary: Topic-based Soroban event published during account registration to advertise an owner's encryption key and note key on chain.

nodes.name: PoolContract
nodes.summary: Soroban contract implementing the privacy pool: bootstraps state in the constructor, exposes transact/register entrypoints, and provides admin-gated ASP updates plus assorted getters and helper utilities.

nodes.name: __constructor
nodes.summary: Soroban constructor that persists admin/token/verifier/ASP addresses and deposit cap, seeds an empty nullifier map, and initializes the Merkle tree with the requested levels.

nodes.name: max_ext_amount
nodes.summary: Returns the 2^248 upper bound on the absolute external transaction amount, used as the BN254-safe field bound.

nodes.name: i256_to_i128_nonneg
nodes.summary: Converts a non-negative I256 value to i128, returning WrongExtAmount on negative input and Overflow when the magnitude exceeds i128.

nodes.name: calculate_public_amount
nodes.summary: Maps a signed external amount into the BN254 field representation expected by the circuit, returning the value for deposits and its field-negation for withdrawals while enforcing the magnitude bound.

nodes.name: is_spent
nodes.summary: Returns whether a nullifier has already been recorded as spent in the persistent nullifier map.

nodes.name: mark_spent
nodes.summary: Marks the given nullifier as spent in the persistent nullifier map to prevent double-spends of input notes.

nodes.name: verify_proof
nodes.summary: Assembles the public-inputs vector (root, ext hash, nullifiers, output commitments, public amount, ASP roots) and invokes the Circom Groth16 verifier contract to validate the proof.

nodes.name: hash_ext_data
nodes.summary: PoolContract method delegating to the free hash_ext_data helper to keccak256-and-field-reduce the ExtData payload for binding it into the proof.

nodes.name: i256_abs_to_u256
nodes.summary: Computes the absolute value of an I256 as a U256, handling negative inputs by subtracting from zero before converting to big-endian unsigned bytes.

nodes.name: transact
nodes.summary: Public transact entrypoint that authenticates the sender, enforces the deposit cap, transfers tokens in for deposits, and dispatches to internal_transact to verify the proof and update the tree.

nodes.name: internal_transact
nodes.summary: Core shielded-transaction handler that checks root validity, prevents nullifier reuse, validates ext-data hash and public amount, verifies the Groth16 proof, marks nullifiers spent, transfers withdrawals, inserts the output commitments, and emits events.

nodes.name: register
nodes.summary: Registers an account by requiring owner authentication and publishing a PublicKeyEvent containing the encryption and note keys.

nodes.name: get_root
nodes.summary: Returns the current Merkle root via MerkleTreeWithHistory::get_last_root.

nodes.name: update_admin
nodes.summary: Admin-gated entrypoint that rotates the contract admin address through the soroban_utils helper.

nodes.name: update_asp_membership
nodes.summary: Admin-gated entrypoint that updates the ASP membership (allowlist) contract address used during proof verification.

nodes.name: update_asp_non_membership
nodes.summary: Admin-gated entrypoint that updates the ASP non-membership (blocklist) contract address used during proof verification.

nodes.name: get_asp_membership_root
nodes.summary: Fetches the current ASP membership root by cross-contract call into the configured ASP membership contract.

nodes.name: get_asp_non_membership_root
nodes.summary: Fetches the current ASP non-membership root by cross-contract call into the configured ASP non-membership contract.

nodes.name: TestSetup
nodes.summary: Test-only struct grouping the addresses and clients (admin, token, verifier, ASP membership, ASP non-membership) wired up by the test harness for the pool contract.

nodes.name: setup_test_contracts
nodes.summary: Registers the ASP membership, ASP non-membership, verifier, and mock token contracts in a test environment and returns the resulting TestSetup fixture.

nodes.name: mk_mock_groth16_proof
nodes.summary: Builds a fake serialized Groth16 proof (G1/G2/G1 affine triple) for use in negative test paths that exercise validation logic without a real prover.

nodes.name: pool_constructor_sets_state
nodes.summary: Verifies that PoolContract::__constructor persists admin and maximum deposit amount in storage and that get_root succeeds against the freshly initialized Merkle tree.

nodes.name: merkle_init_only_once
nodes.summary: Asserts that re-initializing the Merkle tree returns AlreadyInitialized after the pool constructor has set it up.

nodes.name: merkle_insert_updates_root_and_index
nodes.summary: Inserts a leaf pair into the Merkle tree and verifies that the root changes and the next-index advances by two.

nodes.name: merkle_insert_fails_when_full
nodes.summary: Initializes a single-level tree and confirms that a second pair-insertion fails with MerkleTreeFull once capacity is exhausted.

nodes.name: merkle_init_rejects_zero_levels
nodes.summary: Confirms that initializing the Merkle tree with zero levels is rejected with WrongLevels.

nodes.name: transact_rejects_unknown_root
nodes.summary: End-to-end test asserting that calling transact with a root not present in the recent root history is rejected with UnknownRoot.

nodes.name: transact_rejects_bad_ext_hash
nodes.summary: End-to-end test asserting that transact rejects a proof whose ext-data-hash public input does not match the keccak-derived hash of ExtData.

nodes.name: transact_rejects_bad_public_amount
nodes.summary: End-to-end test asserting that transact rejects a proof whose public-amount public input does not equal the field-encoded ext_amount.

nodes.name: constants.rs
nodes.summary: Embeds the BN256 field modulus and the full table of Poseidon2 round constants for both T=2 and T=3 widths, exposed through helper functions that materialize them as Soroban U256 vectors at runtime.
nodes.languageNotes: Massive (3115 lines) generated constants table; the two getters are huge initializer functions because Soroban U256 values must be constructed inside an Env.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for the soroban-utils library that re-exports constants, poseidon2, and utils modules as a flat surface for downstream Soroban contracts.
nodes.languageNotes: no_std crate root using `pub use module::*` to flatten the public API.

nodes.name: poseidon2.rs
nodes.summary: Provides Poseidon2 hash primitives (compression and 3-input hash with domain separation) over the BN254 field, plus the per-level zero-hash table used by Merkle trees in the privacy pool contracts.
nodes.languageNotes: Calls into Soroban's host crypto_hazmat.poseidon2_permutation; the zero-hash leaf is seeded from poseidon2("XLM") for domain separation.

nodes.name: utils.rs
nodes.summary: Shared Soroban contract helpers including an admin-rotation utility, a mock SEP-41-style token used by tests, and ark-bn254 to Soroban byte conversions for Groth16 verification keys.
nodes.languageNotes: Bridges ark-works field/group element encodings into the byte layout the on-chain CircomGroth16Verifier expects (G2 imaginary-component-first ordering).

nodes.name: get_round_constants_t2
nodes.summary: Constructs the full Poseidon2 round constant matrix for width T=2 (used by the 2-to-1 compression hash) as a nested Soroban Vec of U256 values.

nodes.name: get_round_constants_t3
nodes.summary: Constructs the full Poseidon2 round constant matrix for width T=3 (used by the 3-input hash with domain separation) as a nested Soroban Vec of U256 values.

nodes.name: bn256_modulus
nodes.summary: Returns the BN256 scalar field modulus as a Soroban U256 built from the embedded big-endian byte constant.

nodes.name: poseidon2_compress
nodes.summary: Performs Poseidon2 compression on two BN256 field elements via the Soroban host's poseidon2_permutation, applying the standard add-then-reduce compression step over the first output element.

nodes.name: poseidon2_hash2
nodes.summary: Hashes two BN256 field elements together with an optional domain-separation tag using the T=3 Poseidon2 permutation and returns the first output element.

nodes.name: get_zeroes
nodes.summary: Returns the precomputed Merkle-tree zero-hash chain seeded from poseidon2("XLM") at the leaf level and built upward by successive poseidon2_compress applications.

nodes.name: update_admin
nodes.summary: Generic helper that requires_auth from the current admin stored under the given persistent key and overwrites it with a new admin address.

nodes.name: g1_bytes_from_ark
nodes.summary: Serializes an ark-bn254 G1Affine point to the 64-byte big-endian (x || y) layout expected by the on-chain Groth16 verifier.

nodes.name: g2_bytes_from_ark
nodes.summary: Serializes an ark-bn254 G2Affine point to the 128-byte layout (imaginary-component-first per Soroban G2Affine convention) consumed by the verifier contract.

nodes.name: vk_bytes_from_ark
nodes.summary: Converts an ark-groth16 VerifyingKey<Bn254> into the Soroban VerificationKeyBytes struct (alpha/beta/gamma/delta plus the gamma_abc_g1 IC vector) by delegating to the G1/G2 byte encoders.

nodes.name: MockToken
nodes.summary: No-op SEP-41-style token contract used by Soroban unit tests, exposing balance/transfer/transfer_from/approve/allowance methods that always return zero or succeed silently.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Crate root for the end-to-end test harness that bridges the std-based circuits crate with the no-std Soroban contracts crate, exposing only a cfg-gated tests module.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses #[cfg(test)] to keep the entire integration suite out of normal builds.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Module barrel that registers the 2-in-2-out pool integration test and exposes the shared utils helper module.

nodes.name: e2e_pool_2_in_2_out.rs
nodes.summary: End-to-end integration test exercising a full 2-input/2-output privacy pool transaction, including witness preparation, real Groth16 proof generation, Merkle and SMT root construction, contract deployment, and on-chain transact invocation.
nodes.languageNotes: Sets a custom Soroban budget via Env::new_with_config to accommodate the heavy on-chain Groth16 verification cost.

nodes.name: utils.rs
nodes.summary: Shared helpers for end-to-end tests: deploys the pool/ASP/verifier/token contracts, converts between ark Scalar and Soroban U256, builds membership Merkle trees and non-membership SMT overrides, generates a real Groth16 proof from a TxCase, and wraps it for Soroban consumption.
nodes.languageNotes: Bridges three numeric domains (ark BigInt, num-bigint BigUint/BigInt, Soroban U256) and crosses the std/no-std boundary for proof generation versus on-chain inputs.

nodes.name: test_env
nodes.summary: Constructs a Soroban Env with an expanded host-function budget tailored for Groth16 verification, falling back to defaults outside test builds.

nodes.name: test_e2e_transact_with_real_proof
nodes.summary: Main integration test: assembles a 2-in/2-out TxCase, prepares the witness, generates a real Groth16 proof, populates pool/ASP membership/SMT roots, then invokes the pool contract's transact entry point and asserts success.

nodes.name: proving_key_path
nodes.summary: Resolves the filesystem path to the workspace's proving-key directory by walking up from the test crate's CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR.

nodes.name: deploy_contracts
nodes.summary: Registers the verifier, token, ASP membership, ASP non-membership, and pool contracts on the test Env and returns their addresses bundled in a DeployedContracts struct.

nodes.name: scalar_to_u256
nodes.summary: Converts an ark-bn254 Scalar to a Soroban U256 by serializing to big-endian bytes and rebuilding through Bytes::from_array.

nodes.name: u256_to_scalar
nodes.summary: Inverse of scalar_to_u256: copies a Soroban U256's big-endian bytes into a BigUint and reduces it into the bn254 scalar field.

nodes.name: bytes32_to_bigint
nodes.summary: Reads a Soroban BytesN<32> into a 32-byte buffer and constructs a signed num-bigint BigInt from its big-endian representation.

nodes.name: build_membership_trees
nodes.summary: For each input of a TxCase, generates a deterministic prepopulated leaf set via a seed function and builds N_MEM_PROOFS MembershipTreeProof entries used as ASP/membership witnesses.

nodes.name: non_membership_overrides_from_pubs
nodes.summary: Derives sparse Merkle tree override (key, leaf) pairs from a list of public keys, hashing each with Poseidon2 to produce stable non-membership witnesses for the ASP non-membership tree.

nodes.name: generate_proof
nodes.summary: Runs the full witness assembly pipeline (base inputs, membership Merkle proofs, non-membership SMT proofs) and produces a real Groth16 proof by loading the circuit artifacts and proving keys then invoking prove_and_verify_with_keys.
nodes.languageNotes: Carefully uses checked_mul/checked_add to guard index arithmetic across nested input/proof matrices.

nodes.name: wrap_groth16_proof
nodes.summary: Serializes ark-groth16 proof curve points (A in G1, B in G2, C in G1) into fixed-size Soroban G1Affine/G2Affine arrays consumable by the on-chain verifier.

nodes.name: DeployedContracts
nodes.summary: Struct bundling the deployed pool, ASP membership, and ASP non-membership contract addresses returned by deploy_contracts.

nodes.name: MembershipTreeProof
nodes.summary: Struct carrying the prepopulated leaves, target index, and blinding factor required to build one ASP/membership Merkle proof.

nodes.name: NonMembership
nodes.summary: Holds the boolean flag indicating whether non-inclusion proofs should be generated for the ASP non-membership SMT.

nodes.name: build-and-test.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds the Cargo workspace and runs the full Rust test suite on pushes and pull requests to main, after first building the `circuits` crate to generate required artifacts.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses pinned SHA action versions and Swatinem rust-cache for incremental CI performance.

nodes.name: contracts-build.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that compiles every Soroban contract (asp-membership, asp-non-membership, circom-groth16-verifier, pool) to optimized WASM using the Stellar CLI after building the circuits crate.
nodes.languageNotes: Iterates contract packages via shell loop and writes optimized WASM to target/stellar.

nodes.name: coverage-pr.yml
nodes.summary: Two-job GitHub Actions workflow that computes head coverage via cargo-llvm-cov on every pull request, fetches or recomputes base-branch coverage, and posts a comment only when PR coverage drops below the base.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements both an artifact-based fast path and a checkout/recompute fallback for base coverage, plus a github-script step that creates or updates a sticky coverage-drop comment.

nodes.name: coverage.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs cargo-llvm-cov on every push to main and uploads the resulting lcov.info as a 21-day branch artifact for downstream PR coverage comparison.

nodes.name: dependency-audit.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs `cargo deny check` against the workspace whenever any Cargo.toml or Cargo.lock changes, gating advisories, bans, and license/source policy.

nodes.name: deployment.yml
nodes.summary: Two-job production deployment workflow that builds the Trunk web app, packages the circuits source bundle, renders mdBook documentation and cargo doc API reference, then publishes the combined site to GitHub Pages on every push to main.
nodes.languageNotes: Orchestrates Trunk app build via the project Makefile, mdBook docs, and `cargo doc` into a single Pages artifact, and depends on deployments/scripts/package-circuits-source-bundle.sh.

nodes.name: linter.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions lint workflow that enforces nightly rustfmt formatting (using rustfmt.toml), stable Clippy with `-Dwarnings`, and a typo check via crate-ci/typos on every push and pull request to main.

nodes.name: semver-checks.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that runs cargo-semver-checks against the latest `v*` tag (>= v0.1.0) whenever a Cargo.toml is modified in a PR or a version tag is pushed, guarding against accidental API breakage.
nodes.languageNotes: Dynamically resolves the baseline ref via `git describe` and gracefully skips when no suitable version tag exists.

nodes.name: test-ignored.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that builds the workspace and runs the long-running `#[ignore]`-marked tests via `cargo test -- --ignored`, with an 8-hour timeout to cover slow ZK/proving tests.

nodes.name: ub-detection.yml
nodes.summary: Nightly cron-triggered workflow that runs Miri under strict-provenance for the whole workspace and permissive-provenance for `circom-groth16-verifier` to detect undefined behaviour in unsafe code paths.
nodes.languageNotes: Splits the workspace into two Miri runs because ark-groth16/rayon/crossbeam-epoch performs int-to-pointer casts incompatible with strict provenance.

nodes.name: wasm-build.yml
nodes.summary: Two-job GitHub Actions workflow that verifies the `web` crate compiles for `wasm32-unknown-unknown` and runs the `stellar` crate's wasm test suite via wasm-bindgen-cli on every push and pull request to main.

nodes.name: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributor's guide covering commit signing, project structure, prerequisites (Rust 1.92, Circom, Stellar CLI, Trunk, Node.js), and workflows for building/testing crates, circuits, contracts, WASM tests, deployment, and code quality.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Root Cargo workspace manifest declaring all member crates (core/prover/state/stellar/types/witness, web platform, circuits, contracts, e2e-tests, poseidon2, ceremony-cli) and pinning workspace-wide arkworks, soroban-sdk, wasm-bindgen, and patched ark-circom/wasmer dependencies.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses resolver = "3" with edition 2024; enforces strict clippy lints (unwrap_used = deny, arithmetic_side_effects = deny) and a size-optimized release profile (opt-level=z, lto, panic=abort) suited for WASM.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Top-level build automation defining serve/build/release targets that orchestrate Trunk frontend builds, Cargo circuit compilation, npm install, wasm32v1-none toolchain setup, and mdbook documentation generation.

nodes.name: release
nodes.summary: Convenience target that sets RELEASE=1 and delegates to the build target for production-mode Trunk builds.

nodes.name: serve
nodes.summary: Development server target that runs `trunk serve` against the configured dist directory and public URL after ensuring deps and circuits are built.

nodes.name: build
nodes.summary: Frontend build target invoking `trunk build` with optional --release flag, after running install and circuits-build prerequisites.

nodes.name: circuits-build
nodes.summary: Compiles the Circom circuits crate via cargo, optionally forwarding BUILD_TESTS and RELEASE flags to gate test-circuit compilation and release optimization.

nodes.name: install
nodes.summary: Bootstrap target installing npm dependencies for the app, adding the wasm32v1-none Rust target, and ensuring `trunk` is installed via cargo.

nodes.name: clean
nodes.summary: Cleans both Trunk dist artifacts and Cargo target output to reset the workspace.

nodes.name: doc
nodes.summary: Builds the mdbook documentation, generates cargo docs for the workspace, copies them under docs/book/api, and opens the resulting site.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview describing the privacy-preserving Stellar payment system, its Groth16/Circom-based ZK proofs, ASP membership controls, demo deployment instructions, architecture (transaction flow, ASP admin page, circuits, contracts), known limitations, and mixed Apache 2.0 / LGPLv3 licensing.

nodes.name: SECURITY.md
nodes.summary: Security policy directing reporters to GitHub's private vulnerability disclosure flow and outlining the information required to triage and publish advisories.

nodes.name: Trunk.toml
nodes.summary: Trunk configuration for the web frontend, declaring build target app/index.html, port 8000, tailwindcss tooling, and pre_build/build hooks that stage circuit artifacts (r1cs/wasm), legal files, and esbuild-bundled UI/admin JS.
nodes.languageNotes: Hooks read TRUNK_PROFILE to select circuit artifacts from target/circuits-artifacts/<profile> and bundle LGPL source archives for compliance.

nodes.name: _typos.toml
nodes.summary: Configuration for the `typos` spell-checker, whitelisting cryptography-specific terms (groth16, nullifs, consts) and excluding circomlib vendor code plus deployments.json from spell checks.

nodes.name: deny.toml
nodes.summary: cargo-deny configuration enforcing the project's supply-chain policy: target triples (incl. wasm32), allowed OSI licenses, banned wildcard deps, deny on yanked/unknown-registry/unknown-git, and a NethermindEth-only org allowlist with a single wasmerio git exception.

nodes.name: rust-toolchain.toml
nodes.summary: Pins the workspace to Rust 1.92.0 with rustfmt and clippy components, and adds the wasm32v1-none and wasm32-unknown-unknown targets required for browser proving and WASM tests.

nodes.name: rustfmt.toml
nodes.summary: Project-wide rustfmt style guide setting max_width=100, edition 2024, crate-granular import merging, wrapped comments, doc-code formatting, and deterministic impl-item ordering.

nodes.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
nodes.summary: Detailed architecture document for the web application, explaining the core/platforms split, WASM main thread, Storage and Prover Web Workers, SQLite-on-OPFS persistence, deterministic key derivation from Freighter signatures, and recovery scenarios.
nodes.languageNotes: Includes a Mermaid flowchart describing data flow between JS UI, WASM main thread, Storage Worker, Prover Worker, and remote Stellar RPC.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Entry-point readme for the privacy pool web application describing PoC scope, feature list (deposits, transfers, withdrawals, Freighter integration, Groth16 in WASM), build commands, and configuration files.

nodes.name: admin.html
nodes.summary: ASP (Association Set Provider) admin console UI for managing membership and non-membership Merkle trees, including key derivation, leaf hash computation via Poseidon2, and on-chain insert actions.
nodes.languageNotes: Loads the admin module via `<script type="module" src="js/admin.js">` and shares the compiled `css/app.css` Tailwind bundle with index.html.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Main user-facing UI shell for PoolStellar, wiring up Trunk to compile the Rust web crate plus storage-worker and prover-worker WASM binaries, and hosting Tailwind-styled deposit, transfer, withdrawal, and note management widgets.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Trunk `data-trunk rel="rust"` directives to bundle the main WASM module and two Web Worker binaries from `crates/platforms/web`, and loads UI logic from `js/ui.js`.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: npm manifest declaring esbuild and tailwindcss as dev tooling and Stellar SDK + Freighter API as runtime dependencies for the browser UI.

nodes.name: deploy.sh
nodes.summary: Bash deployment driver that builds and deploys ASP membership, ASP non-membership, Circom Groth16 verifier, and one or more Pool Soroban contracts to a Stellar network, then writes a deployments.json manifest.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses strict mode (set -euo pipefail), arg parsing via case, multi-token pool specs (contract/native/classic), and shells out to the stellar CLI for build/deploy and ledger queries.

nodes.name: usage
nodes.summary: Prints the CLI usage banner describing required arguments, options, pool spec formats, and verification-key handling for the deployer.

nodes.name: resolve_address
nodes.summary: Normalizes a Stellar identity or G/C-address into a canonical address by pattern-matching the input or resolving it through stellar keys address.

nodes.name: get_latest_ledger_seq
nodes.summary: Queries 'stellar ledger latest' for the current ledger sequence and parses it out of the human-readable output for use as a pool deployment ledger marker.

nodes.name: deploy_contract
nodes.summary: Runs 'stellar contract deploy' for a given WASM and forwards optional constructor arguments, then parses the C... contract id from stdout/stderr output.

nodes.name: parse_pool_spec
nodes.summary: Parses a --pool spec of the form contract:<id>, native:<id>, or classic:<code>:<issuer>:<id> and emits both the resolved token contract id and a structured asset JSON blob.

nodes.name: package-circuits-source-bundle.sh
nodes.summary: POSIX sh script that packages the Circom circuits source (including vendored circomlib at the locked commit) plus build instructions and license texts into a tar.gz, satisfying LGPL-3.0 corresponding-source obligations.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a heredoc-templated BUILDING.md that interpolates the repo commit and circomlib lock SHA at packaging time.

nodes.name: stage-dist-legal.sh
nodes.summary: Trunk staging hook that drops top-level LICENSE, NOTICE, DISCLAIMER, and circomlib LGPL/GPL license texts into the web app's distribution directory and renders the circuits NOTICE template with current commit/build metadata.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses sed-based template substitution (@REPO_COMMIT@, @BUILD_DATE_UTC@, @CIRCOMLIB_COMMIT@, @SOURCE_BUNDLE_URL@) to materialize the published circuits notice.

nodes.name: SUMMARY.md
nodes.summary: mdBook table-of-contents file that orders the project documentation into Introduction, Contributing, Security, App (with Architecture sub-page), and API Reference sections.

nodes.name: api.md
nodes.summary: API reference index linking to rustdoc-generated documentation for every workspace crate, grouped into Core (circuits), App WASM (types/state/stellar/prover/witness/web), Contracts (pool, ASP, verifier, utils), and Tests.

nodes.name: app.md
nodes.summary: Overview of the Privacy Pool web application describing client-side Groth16 proving, Freighter integration, local SQLite state, and the make targets (install, circuits-build, serve, build, clean) used to build and run the WASM app.

nodes.name: architecture.md
nodes.summary: Deep-dive architecture document explaining the core/platforms crate split, the WASM main thread + Storage Worker + Prover Worker layout, the typed worker protocol, the indexer/RPC data flow (with a mermaid diagram), Freighter-derived BN254/X25519 keypair derivation, and recovery scenarios after browser-data loss or account switch.
nodes.languageNotes: Embeds a mermaid flowchart that diagrams how the JS UI, WASM main thread, Storage Worker, Prover Worker, and Stellar RPC interact via the typed protocol.rs messages.

nodes.name: contributing.md
nodes.summary: Contributor's guide covering commit signing, the full repository layout (app, circuits, contracts, e2e-tests, poseidon2), prerequisites (Rust 1.92, Circom 2.2.2, Stellar CLI, Trunk, wasm-bindgen-cli), and recipes for building/testing crates, circuits, contracts, and E2E suites, plus app development with make install/serve/dist.

nodes.name: introduction.md
nodes.summary: Project introduction describing the ZK privacy-pool system on Stellar (Groth16 + Circom + Soroban + ASP membership/non-membership controls), with a step-by-step demo walkthrough (deploy contracts, serve frontend, populate ASP, use admin page), an architecture overview of transaction flow and circuits, and notes on limitations, licensing (Apache 2.0 + LGPLv3 for circuits), and AI-tool disclosure.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Security policy instructing reporters to use GitHub's private vulnerability advisories rather than public issues, with required disclosure fields and a commitment to publish fixes via GitHub security advisories.

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo configuration that sets the default verifier VK JSON path for tests and applies wasm32 target-specific link flags (initial/max memory, wasm-bindgen test runner).

nodes.name: pre-push
nodes.summary: Pre-push git hook shell script that runs cargo sort, cargo deny, nightly rustfmt, and typos checks before allowing a push, blocking on any failure.

nodes.name: pull_request_template.md
nodes.summary: GitHub pull request template for external contributors with sections for change summary, related issues, context, and a required checklist.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore list for the understand-anything analyzer that excludes build artifacts, large generated files, and irrelevant directories from the knowledge graph scan.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the core prover crate, declaring dependencies and per-target (native vs wasm32) dependency sets used for Groth16 proof generation.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the core state crate covering runtime dependencies, build-dependencies (sha2, hex for disclaimer hash baking), and dev-dependencies.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Build script for the state crate that reads disclaimer.md, computes its SHA-256 hash, and emits a Rust constant in OUT_DIR so the binary embeds the canonical disclaimer hash for acceptance tracking.

nodes.name: disclaimer.md
nodes.summary: Legal disclaimer for the Stellar Private Payments proof-of-concept covering testnet-only scope, no warranties, liability limits, eligibility, data privacy, and governing law; its SHA-256 hash is embedded at build time and tracked per user.

nodes.name: schema.sql
nodes.summary: SQLite schema for client-side state covering contracts, accounts, keypairs, pool nullifiers/commitments, ASP membership leaves, user notes, scan checkpoints, and disclaimer acceptances with supporting indexes.

nodes.name: contracts
nodes.summary: Tracks known Stellar contract identifiers (e.g., pool contract, ASP contract) and their on-chain addresses.

nodes.name: indexing_metadata
nodes.summary: Records the latest indexed ledger position per contract so background sync can resume incrementally.

nodes.name: raw_contract_events
nodes.summary: Stores raw Soroban contract events (topics, value) keyed by contract for downstream parsing into commitments and nullifiers.

nodes.name: accounts
nodes.summary: Local mapping of Stellar account addresses to internal account IDs used to scope private state.

nodes.name: keypairs
nodes.summary: Stores encryption and note keypairs per account used for note encryption and nullifier derivation.

nodes.name: pool_nullifiers
nodes.summary: Spent-note nullifiers observed on the pool contract; used to mark local notes as spent and enforce double-spend detection.

nodes.name: pool_commitments
nodes.summary: Note commitments added to the pool Merkle tree with their leaf index and encrypted output for wallet scanning.

nodes.name: public_keys
nodes.summary: Address-book style table of remote owners' encryption and note public keys used when sending private payments.

nodes.name: asp_membership_leaves
nodes.summary: ASP (Association Set Provider) membership tree leaves with their index and tree root snapshot for proving inclusion in the allowed set.

nodes.name: user_notes
nodes.summary: Per-account decrypted notes (amount, blinding factor, spend status) representing the user's private pool balance.

nodes.name: account_commitment_scan
nodes.summary: Per-account checkpoint of the last commitment scanned for a pool contract to support incremental note discovery.

nodes.name: nullifier_scan_state
nodes.summary: Checkpoint of the last nullifier scanned per pool contract for marking spent notes incrementally.

nodes.name: disclaimer_acceptances
nodes.summary: Records which disclaimer hash each account accepted and when, gating use of the privacy features behind acknowledgement.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the core stellar crate that wraps Stellar/Soroban RPC and SDK access, with per-target dependency sets for wasm32 builds.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the core types crate exposing shared data structures (notes, commitments, proofs) with feature flags and dev-dependencies.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the core witness crate that wraps the Circom witness calculator (ark-circom + wasmer) with native and wasm32 dependency sets.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Witness calculator wrapper around ark-circom that loads a Circom WASM/R1CS pair, flattens JSON inputs into BN254 field elements, runs the witness, and serializes it to a 32-byte LE field-element buffer for Groth16 proving.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an iterative stack-based flattener (flatten_input / flatten_pure_array) instead of recursion to keep WASM stack usage bounded when processing deeply nested JSON inputs.

nodes.name: WitnessCalculator
nodes.summary: Holds a wasmer Store, an ark-circom WitnessCalculator, and cached witness/public-input sizes; exposes new(), compute_witness(), and metadata accessors.

nodes.name: compute_witness
nodes.summary: Parses a JSON inputs object, flattens it into a HashMap of BN254 field-element vectors via flatten_input, invokes the ark-circom witness calculator, and returns the witness serialized as 32-byte LE field elements.

nodes.name: to_field_element
nodes.summary: Normalises a signed BigInt into the canonical BN254 field by adding the modulus when negative and validating bounds.

nodes.name: flatten_input
nodes.summary: Iteratively flattens a nested JSON value (objects, arrays, hex/decimal strings, numbers) keyed by `key` into a HashMap of BN254 field elements using a work-item stack.

nodes.name: flatten_pure_array
nodes.summary: Iteratively walks a homogeneous array (numbers or strings) and pushes BN254 field elements into the inputs map under the original key.

nodes.name: witness_to_bytes
nodes.summary: Serializes each BigInt witness element to a left-zero-padded 32-byte little-endian buffer suitable for the BN254 prover and concatenates them into a single Vec<u8>.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the web platform crate that produces a cdylib plus two binary targets (prover_worker, storage_worker) and pulls in wasm-bindgen dependencies for browser execution.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Build script for the web platform crate that hashes the active R1CS/WASM/VK circuit artifacts and emits a Rust constants file (sha256 fingerprints, byte arrays) so the browser bundle ships with verified circuit digests.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Resolves repo root, locates the per-profile circuits-artifacts directory, reads R1CS/WASM/VK files, computes SHA-256 fingerprints and formatted byte literals, and writes them as Rust constants into OUT_DIR.

nodes.name: prover_worker.rs
nodes.summary: Binary entry point for the Web Worker that runs Groth16 proving in the browser; delegates entirely to web::workers::prover::worker_main.

nodes.name: storage_worker.rs
nodes.summary: Binary entry point for the Web Worker that owns the SQLite/OPFS storage layer in the browser; delegates entirely to web::workers::storage::worker_main.

nodes.name: app.css
nodes.summary: Application stylesheet defining layout, typography, and component styling for the privacy payments web UI.

nodes.name: errors.js
nodes.summary: UI error normalization module that maps raw exceptions (proof verification failures, user-cancelled wallet flows, Soroban host errors) into friendly user-facing messages for the deposit/withdraw/transact/transfer flows.

nodes.name: getErrorMessage
nodes.summary: Extracts a string message from any thrown value (Error, string, object) with safe fallbacks.

nodes.name: isProofVerificationError
nodes.summary: Substring-matches a lowercased error message against known Groth16/Soroban verifier failure markers to flag ZK proof rejections.

nodes.name: isUserCancelledError
nodes.summary: Detects wallet/user-cancellation messages (declined, rejected, cancelled) so the UI can suppress noisy error toasts for intentional user actions.

nodes.name: getFriendlyErrorMessage
nodes.summary: Pattern-matches raw errors against a table of known regexes (proof failure, contract host errors, insufficient balance, etc.) and returns a localized, user-friendly explanation.

nodes.name: getTransactionErrorMessage
nodes.summary: Top-level helper for deposit/withdraw/transact/transfer flows that returns null for user cancellation and otherwise routes to getFriendlyErrorMessage with operation context.

nodes.name: index.js
nodes.summary: UI module barrel that re-exports App, Wallet, Tabs, Notes, AddressBook, Prover/Sync UI, Deposit/Withdraw/Transact/Transfer flow modules, and error helpers as the single entry point for the browser app shell.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the circuit-keys library crate that emits Groth16 proving and verification keys in snarkjs JSON, Soroban-friendly binary, and Rust-const formats.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library that atomically writes Groth16 keys in multiple formats: ark-serialized proving keys, snarkjs-compatible VK JSON, and Soroban verifier binary plus a generated Rust constants file for embedding the VK directly into contract code.
nodes.languageNotes: atomic_write uses a temp file plus fsync of the parent directory on Unix to ensure crash-safe writes; the wasm32 implementation is a stubbed error.

nodes.name: atomic_write
nodes.summary: Crash-safe atomic file write that creates a uniquely-named temp file in the destination directory, writes and fsyncs it, atomically renames it into place, and fsyncs the parent directory.

nodes.name: write_proving_key_bin
nodes.summary: Serializes an ark-groth16 ProvingKey in compressed form and atomically writes it to disk.

nodes.name: vk_to_snarkjs_json
nodes.summary: Converts an ark-groth16 VerifyingKey into the snarkjs JSON layout (alpha/beta/gamma/delta on G1/G2 plus IC points) so existing snarkjs tooling can verify proofs.

nodes.name: g1_to_soroban_bytes
nodes.summary: Encodes a BN254 G1 point as 64 raw big-endian bytes (x || y) in the layout expected by the Soroban verifier contract.

nodes.name: g2_to_soroban_bytes
nodes.summary: Encodes a BN254 G2 point as 128 raw big-endian bytes (x.c1, x.c0, y.c1, y.c0) matching the Soroban verifier's expected ordering.

nodes.name: write_vk_soroban_bin
nodes.summary: Packs the verification key (alpha, beta, gamma, delta, IC count, IC points) into the Soroban verifier's binary layout and atomically writes it to disk.

nodes.name: write_vk_rust_const
nodes.summary: Generates a Rust source file with byte-literal constants for the VK components so the Soroban verifier contract can embed the verification key without runtime parsing.

nodes.name: COPYING
nodes.summary: GPL v3 license text bundled with the circuits crate, covering the Circom source files vendored or referenced in this workspace.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the circuits crate that drives the Circom 2 compiler at build time, declaring circom_compiler dependencies and groth16 ceremony tooling.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Build script that scans the circuits directory for Circom main components, resolves include dependencies, invokes the Circom 2 compiler to produce R1CS/WASM/SYM artifacts, runs the local Groth16 trusted setup, and publishes per-profile artifacts plus VK exports for downstream crates.
nodes.languageNotes: Manual include-graph extraction via regex and a dependency-mtime check let the script skip recompilation when neither the main .circom nor any transitive include has changed.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full circuit build: locate inputs, fetch circomlib, parse and type-check each Circom main component, compile to R1CS+WASM, run Groth16 setup for designated circuits, and copy artifacts to the publish directory.

nodes.name: extract_circom_dependencies
nodes.summary: Performs a regex-based transitive walk of Circom `include` directives starting from a main file to enumerate every dependency for cargo:rerun-if-changed tracking.

nodes.name: compile_wasm
nodes.summary: Invokes the Circom 2 WASM code generator to produce the witness-generation .wat for a given circuit, then drives wat_to_wasm to emit the final .wasm.

nodes.name: generate_groth16_keys
nodes.summary: Runs the local (non-MPC) Groth16 trusted setup against a circuit's R1CS to produce the proving and verification keys for development builds.

nodes.name: generate_keys_if_needed
nodes.summary: Caches Groth16 keys per circuit/R1CS hash, regenerating only when keys are missing, the R1CS has changed, or VERIFIER_VK_JSON forces a refresh; writes pk.bin, vk.json, vk.soroban.bin, and the Rust const VK file.

nodes.name: keypair.circom
nodes.summary: Defines the Keypair and Signature templates that derive a public key as Poseidon2(privateKey, 0) and compute hash-based signatures over (privateKey, commitment, merklePath) with domain separation tags.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Poseidon2 with t=3 padding and explicit domain separation constants (0x03 for keypair, 0x04 for signature).

nodes.name: Keypair
nodes.summary: Derives a public key from a private key as Poseidon2 hash with padding and domain separation tag 0x03.

nodes.name: Signature
nodes.summary: Computes a hash-based signature as Poseidon2(privateKey, commitment, merklePath) with domain separation tag 0x04.

nodes.name: merkleProof.circom
nodes.summary: Computes a Merkle root from a leaf, path elements, and packed path indices using switchers and the PoseidonCompress hash to combine sibling pairs.
nodes.languageNotes: Path indices are packed as a single field element and decoded via Num2Bits.

nodes.name: MerkleProof
nodes.summary: Reconstructs a Merkle root from leaf, pathElements, and pathIndices using level-wise switchers and PoseidonCompress hashers.

nodes.name: merkleTree.circom
nodes.summary: Builds a full Merkle tree root from a complete leaves array via the TreeLayer helper that hashes consecutive layers with PoseidonCompress.

nodes.name: TreeLayer
nodes.summary: Helper template that computes hashes of the next Merkle tree layer by pairwise PoseidonCompress over the input nodes.

nodes.name: MerkleTree
nodes.summary: Builds a Merkle tree root from a complete leaves array by stacking TreeLayer templates from leaves to root.

nodes.name: merkleTreeUpdater.circom
nodes.summary: Verifies that inserting a fresh subtree of leaves replaces an all-zero subtree in the parent Merkle tree, checking old and new roots against the same path.

nodes.name: MerkleTreeUpdater
nodes.summary: Verifies a subtree insertion by checking that the old root contained a known zero subtree and the new root contains the freshly computed subtree at the same path.

nodes.name: policy_tx_2_2.circom
nodes.summary: Entry point that instantiates the PolicyTransaction main component with 2 inputs, 2 outputs, 1 membership/non-membership proof per input, and depth-10 Merkle and SMT trees.

nodes.name: policyTransaction.circom
nodes.summary: Extends the base shielded transaction with ASP membership and non-membership proofs for each input, enforcing that inputs satisfy allow-list and deny-list policies under a shared public key.
nodes.languageNotes: Defines MembershipProof and NonMembershipProof bus types and aggregates per-input UTXO ownership, nullifier, Merkle root, membership Merkle, and SMT non-membership checks.

nodes.name: PolicyTransaction
nodes.summary: Verifies a shielded JoinSplit transaction with ASP policy: for each input checks ownership, commitment, nullifier, Merkle inclusion, plus per-input membership and SMT non-membership proofs bound to the public key.

nodes.name: poseidon2_compress.circom
nodes.summary: Implements the optimized Poseidon2 compression function for 2 inputs (Section 3.1 of the Poseidon2 paper), suitable for internal node hashing in binary Merkle trees.

nodes.name: PoseidonCompress
nodes.summary: Computes the 2-to-1 Poseidon2 compression P(x) + x using the t=2 permutation, returning the first output element.

nodes.name: poseidon2_const.circom
nodes.summary: Provides Poseidon2 round constants and diagonal matrix parameters for BN254 with state widths t=2, 3, and 4, extracted from Horizen's reference Sage script.
nodes.languageNotes: Holds large constant tables returned from circom functions; no logic, only parameter data.

nodes.name: poseidon2_hash.circom
nodes.summary: Exposes fixed-size Poseidon2 hashing with explicit domain separation as an extra capacity input, omitting the full sponge construction.

nodes.name: Poseidon2
nodes.summary: Fixed-size Poseidon2 hash with n field inputs and a domain separation capacity bit, returning the first permutation output.

nodes.name: poseidon2_perm.circom
nodes.summary: Implements the full Poseidon2 permutation for BN254 with the SBox, MatMul_M4, internal and external round templates, and the LinearLayer composed into the Permutation template.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses 8 external rounds (4 before + 4 after) and 56 internal partial rounds; specialized fast path for t=4 via MatMul_M4.

nodes.name: SBox
nodes.summary: Computes the x^5 S-box used in each Poseidon2 round.

nodes.name: MatMul_M4
nodes.summary: Efficient 4x4 matrix multiplication specialization from Section 5.1 of the Poseidon2 paper using shared partial sums.

nodes.name: InternalRound
nodes.summary: Applies one Poseidon2 partial (internal) round: S-box on the first element plus a diagonal internal matrix mixing across all state elements.

nodes.name: ExternalRound
nodes.summary: Applies one Poseidon2 full (external) round: S-box on every element followed by the external matrix layer specialized for t=4.

nodes.name: LinearLayer
nodes.summary: Initial linear layer of the Poseidon2 permutation, applying the t-specific external matrix to the state before round processing.

nodes.name: Permutation
nodes.summary: Top-level Poseidon2 permutation: initial linear layer, 4 external rounds, 56 internal rounds, and 4 trailing external rounds, with state width t configurable.

nodes.name: selectiveDisclosure_1.circom
nodes.summary: Entry point that instantiates the SelectiveDisclosure main component for a single note commitment with a depth-10 Merkle tree.

nodes.name: selectiveDisclosure.circom
nodes.summary: Lets a user prove ownership of one or more note commitments under a shared external context (purpose, authority, pool) without revealing their private inputs.

nodes.name: SelectiveDisclosure
nodes.summary: Proves ownership of nNotes note commitments against their per-note Merkle roots without revealing private keys, amounts, or blindings, binding the proof to an external context hash.

nodes.name: smthash_poseidon2.circom
nodes.summary: Provides the Poseidon2-based SMT leaf hash (key, value, 1) and internal node hash (left, right) used by the sparse Merkle tree verifier.

nodes.name: SMTHash1
nodes.summary: Computes the SMT leaf hash H(key | value | 1) using Poseidon2 with domain separation tag 1.

nodes.name: SMTHash2
nodes.summary: Computes the SMT internal node hash H(left | right) using PoseidonCompress.

nodes.name: smtverifier.circom
nodes.summary: Sparse Merkle tree inclusion/exclusion verifier adapted from iden3/circomlib, driven by the SMTLevIns/SMTVerifierSM state machine and per-level reconstruction.

nodes.name: SMTVerifier
nodes.summary: Verifies inclusion (fnc=0) or non-inclusion (fnc=1) of a (key, value) entry in a sparse Merkle tree by running the per-level state machine and checking the reconstructed root against the claimed root.

nodes.name: smtverifierlevel.circom
nodes.summary: Per-level SMT verifier component that emits the root for one tree level depending on the state (top, i0, iold, inew, na) selected by the state machine.

nodes.name: SMTVerifierLevel
nodes.summary: Computes the SMT verifier output root for one level using a switcher and SMTHash2, blending state-machine flags to pick between top hash, old leaf, or new leaf.

nodes.name: keypair_test.circom
nodes.summary: Test harness circuit asserting that the Keypair template derives the expected public key from a given private key.

nodes.name: merkleProof_5.circom
nodes.summary: Test entry point instantiating MerkleProof with 5 levels as a main component.

nodes.name: poseidon2_compress.circom
nodes.summary: Test entry point instantiating the PoseidonCompress template as a main component.

nodes.name: poseidon2_hash_2.circom
nodes.summary: Test entry point instantiating Poseidon2 hash with 2 inputs as a main component.

nodes.name: signature_test.circom
nodes.summary: Test harness circuit asserting that the Signature template produces the expected signature for given private key, commitment, and merkle path.

nodes.name: sparse_merkle_tree.circom
nodes.summary: Test entry point instantiating the SMTVerifier with 254 levels as a main component.

nodes.name: transaction2.circom
nodes.summary: Test entry point instantiating the base Transaction template with 5 Merkle levels and 2 inputs / 2 outputs.

nodes.name: transaction.circom
nodes.summary: Universal shielded JoinSplit transaction circuit (nIns inputs, nOuts outputs) enforcing UTXO ownership, commitments, nullifiers, Merkle inclusion, and amount conservation.
nodes.languageNotes: Range-checks output amounts to 248 bits to prevent overflow and binds extDataHash via a safety constraint.

nodes.name: Transaction
nodes.summary: Verifies a shielded transaction with nIns inputs and nOuts outputs: ownership, commitment, nullifier uniqueness, Merkle inclusion of inputs, output range, and amount conservation including publicAmount.

nodes.name: CODEOWNERS
nodes.summary: GitHub CODEOWNERS file assigning all repository paths to the maintainers @Fantoni0, @NiDimi, and @cupicmarko for required review.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the asp-membership Soroban contract crate, producing both lib and cdylib targets and depending on soroban-sdk, soroban-utils, and zkhash (dev) via workspace inheritance.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the circom-groth16-verifier crate declaring Soroban SDK, arkworks, and a build-script dependency to embed the verifying key at compile time.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Cargo build script that reads a Circom-generated verifying-key JSON and emits a vk.rs file with the alpha/beta/gamma/delta/IC constants in Soroban BN254 byte format.
nodes.languageNotes: Converts Circom's decimal-string field elements into the compressed byte representation expected by Soroban's BN254 host functions using the circuit_keys helper crate.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Soroban contract that verifies Groth16 proofs generated by Circom over BN254 using either an embedded compile-time verifying key or one provided at call time.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Soroban's bn254 host functions (g1_mul, g1_add, pairing_check) to execute the Groth16 verification equation with the encoded verifying key.

nodes.name: test.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for the Groth16 verifier contract using an arkworks ConstraintSynthesizer to generate real Groth16 proofs, covering valid verification, wrong input length, and malformed proof bytes.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the pool Soroban contract crate declaring its cdylib output and dependencies on the verifier, ASP contracts, and types.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Build orchestration for the pool Soroban contract with targets for build, test, fmt, and clean producing the WASM artifact.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the soroban-utils helper crate that bundles shared Soroban contract utilities like admin rotation.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the shared types crate that defines Groth16-related types reused across the verifier and pool contracts.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Shared Soroban contract types crate defining Groth16Error, VerificationKeyBytes, and Groth16Proof with byte deserialization helpers.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements TryFrom<Bytes> for Groth16Proof that slices the input into G1+G2+G1 byte segments and constructs the BN254 affine points.

nodes.name: LGPL-3.0.txt

nodes.name: policy_tx_2_2_proving_key.bin
nodes.summary: Binary Groth16 proving key for the policy_tx_2_2 circuit shipped with the testnet deployment so clients can generate proofs without re-running the trusted setup.

nodes.name: policy_tx_2_2_vk_const.rs
nodes.summary: Auto-generated Rust constants embedding the policy_tx_2_2 verifying key bytes (alpha, beta, gamma, delta, IC) for inclusion in the on-chain verifier.
nodes.languageNotes: Produced by the circom-groth16-verifier build script from the matching vk.json file.

nodes.name: policy_tx_2_2_vk.json
nodes.summary: Circom-generated JSON verifying key for the policy_tx_2_2 circuit containing the BN254 G1/G2 points (alpha, beta, gamma, delta) and IC array for two public inputs.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documents the testnet circuit-key artifacts and chronologically records the trusted setup ceremonies that produced them.

nodes.name: deployments.json
nodes.summary: Testnet deployment manifest recording the network, deployer/admin addresses, and contract IDs for the ASP membership/non-membership, verifier, and pool contracts.

nodes.name: book.toml
nodes.summary: mdBook configuration for the project documentation site setting the book title, source directory, and HTML output options.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Build script entrypoint that reads the verifier VK JSON path from VERIFIER_VK_JSON, converts it to Soroban byte constants, and writes vk.rs into OUT_DIR.

nodes.name: g1_bytes
nodes.summary: Parses a Circom G1 point (decimal x,y) and converts it to the Soroban-compressed BN254 byte representation.

nodes.name: g2_bytes
nodes.summary: Parses a Circom G2 point (paired Fq2 coordinates) and converts it to the Soroban BN254 byte representation.

nodes.name: fmt_bytes
nodes.summary: Formats a byte slice as a Rust array literal like [0x00, 0x01, ...] for inclusion in the generated source file.

nodes.name: vk_rs_from_json
nodes.summary: Top-level translator that parses a Circom VK JSON and produces the full vk.rs source with VK_ALPHA_G1, VK_BETA_G2, VK_GAMMA_G2, VK_DELTA_G2, and VK_IC constants.

nodes.name: VerificationKey
nodes.summary: Soroban contract type representing a Groth16 verifying key as parsed BN254 G1/G2 affine points plus the IC vector.

nodes.name: CircomGroth16Verifier
nodes.summary: Soroban contract struct that exposes verify (using the embedded VK) and verify_with_vk (using a supplied VK) entrypoints for Groth16 proof verification.

nodes.name: verification_key_from_bytes
nodes.summary: Constructs a VerificationKey by parsing each VerificationKeyBytes field as the corresponding BN254 affine point.

nodes.name: embedded_vk
nodes.summary: Builds a VerificationKey at runtime from the compile-time VK_ALPHA_G1/VK_BETA_G2/etc constants generated by build.rs.

nodes.name: verify
nodes.summary: Public contract entrypoint that verifies a Groth16 proof against the embedded verifying key for the given public inputs.

nodes.name: verify_with_vk
nodes.summary: Core Groth16 verification routine that accumulates the input commitment from IC and public inputs and runs the pairing check using Soroban's BN254 host functions.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses env.crypto().bn254() to perform g1_mul, g1_add, and the final pairing_check that asserts the Groth16 equation e(A,B) = e(alpha,beta) * e(vk_x,gamma) * e(C,delta).

nodes.name: ElevenInputCircuit
nodes.summary: Test arkworks circuit with eleven public inputs used to generate real Groth16 proofs against the on-chain verifier.

nodes.name: generate_constraints
nodes.summary: Implements ConstraintSynthesizer for ElevenInputCircuit by allocating input variables and enforcing a simple r1cs constraint involving them.

nodes.name: fr_from_ark
nodes.summary: Converts an arkworks BN254 scalar to a Soroban Bn254Fr by serializing big-endian and reconstructing the on-chain field element.

nodes.name: groth16_proof_from_ark
nodes.summary: Converts an arkworks Groth16 Proof into Soroban Groth16Proof bytes by serializing each G1/G2/G1 point.

nodes.name: serialize_proof
nodes.summary: Concatenates a Soroban Groth16Proof's A/B/C bytes into a single Bytes value for byte-level tests.

nodes.name: build_test
nodes.summary: Generates a Groth16 setup and proof for the ElevenInputCircuit using arkworks and returns the proof, public inputs, and verification key in Soroban formats.

nodes.name: test_env
nodes.summary: Builds a Soroban test Env configured with BN254 cost params needed by the Groth16 host functions.

nodes.name: verifies_valid_proof
nodes.summary: Happy-path test asserting that a real Groth16 proof generated by arkworks is accepted by the on-chain verifier.

nodes.name: rejects_wrong_public_input_length
nodes.summary: Negative test confirming the verifier rejects proofs when fewer than the expected public inputs are supplied.

nodes.name: groth16_proof_parsing_checks_size
