nodes.name: Groth16Error
nodes.summary: Shared error enum for Groth16 proof handling distinguishing InvalidProof, MalformedPublicInputs, and MalformedProof.

nodes.name: VerificationKeyBytes
nodes.summary: Soroban contract type wrapping the raw byte form of a Groth16 verifying key (alpha, beta, gamma, delta, IC) prior to BN254 deserialization.

nodes.name: Groth16Proof
nodes.summary: Soroban contract type representing a parsed Groth16 proof with BN254 G1, G2, and G1 components and helpers for emptiness checks and byte deserialization.

nodes.name: is_empty
nodes.summary: Returns true when all three components of a Groth16Proof serialize to empty bytes.

nodes.name: try_from
nodes.summary: TryFrom<Bytes> impl for Groth16Proof that slices the input into G1+G2+G1 segments and constructs each BN254 affine point or returns MalformedProof on size mismatch.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Build orchestration for the asp-membership Soroban contract with targets for build, test, fmt, and clean producing the WASM artifact.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ASP membership Soroban contract maintaining an append-only Poseidon2-hashed Merkle tree of approved leaves with admin-gated or permissionless insertion modes.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Soroban persistent storage with DataKey enum and emits LeafAddedEvent on each insertion; relies on poseidon2_compress from the workspace poseidon2 crate.

nodes.name: test.rs
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for the asp-membership contract covering initialization, leaf insertion, admin updates, permissionless mode, and Merkle root consistency against off-chain Poseidon2.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Soroban test Env with arkworks Poseidon2 reference implementation to cross-check on-chain hashes.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the asp-non-membership Soroban contract crate declaring the cdylib library, Soroban SDK, and workspace dependencies.

nodes.name: Makefile
nodes.summary: Build orchestration for the asp-non-membership Soroban contract with targets for build, test, fmt, and clean.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ASP non-membership Soroban contract implementing a sparse Merkle tree (SMT) supporting insert/update/delete and a verify_non_membership entrypoint for proving a key is absent.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements a JJ-style indexed sparse Merkle tree where leaves are recursively hashed via Poseidon2; recursion in find_key_internal walks the tree by key bits and returns siblings for proof verification.

nodes.name: test.rs
nodes.summary: Extensive test suite for the asp-non-membership SMT covering insert/update/delete flows, root consistency with Circom circuits, and exhaustive verify_non_membership negative and positive cases.
nodes.languageNotes: Cross-validates Soroban contract roots against fixed values expected by the Circom circuits to ensure on-chain/off-chain hash parity.

nodes.name: DataKey
nodes.summary: Persistent storage key enum for the membership contract enumerating Admin, FilledSubtrees, Zeroes, Levels, NextIndex, Root, and AdminInsertOnly slots.

nodes.name: Error
nodes.summary: Soroban contracterror enum encoding NotAuthorized, MerkleTreeFull, WrongLevels, NotInitialized, and Overflow failures for the membership contract.

nodes.name: LeafAddedEvent
nodes.summary: Contract event published when a new leaf is inserted, carrying the leaf value, its index, and the new Merkle root.

nodes.name: ASPMembership
nodes.summary: Soroban contract struct that bundles all entrypoints for the ASP membership Merkle tree (constructor, admin management, hashing, and leaf insertion).

nodes.name: __constructor
nodes.summary: Initializes the Merkle tree by validating levels, seeding the zero hashes for every level, and computing the initial root from the topmost zero.

nodes.name: update_admin
nodes.summary: Transfers contract administration to a new address, delegating the actual rotation to soroban_utils::update_admin.

nodes.name: set_admin_insert_only
nodes.summary: Admin-gated toggle that switches the contract between admin-only and permissionless leaf insertion modes.

nodes.name: get_root
nodes.summary: Read-only accessor returning the current Merkle root from persistent storage.

nodes.name: hash_pair
nodes.summary: Stateless helper exposing Poseidon2 two-to-one compression of two U256 inputs for parity with off-chain provers.

nodes.name: insert_leaf
nodes.summary: Appends a leaf to the Merkle tree by hashing it up through filled subtrees and zero siblings, updating the root, advancing NextIndex, and emitting LeafAddedEvent.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the classic incremental Merkle tree algorithm used by Tornado Cash, alternating between filled subtrees and zero values per level.

nodes.name: test_env
nodes.summary: Builds a Soroban test Env configured with BN254 cost params required for Poseidon2 host functions.

nodes.name: test_constructor_sets_admin_and_levels
nodes.summary: Verifies that the constructor stores admin and levels values into persistent storage as expected.

nodes.name: test_get_root
nodes.summary: Checks that get_root reflects the initial zero-tree root and updates correctly after a leaf insertion.

nodes.name: test_hash_pair
nodes.summary: Asserts hash_pair returns the expected Poseidon2 compression for representative U256 inputs.

nodes.name: test_insert_leaf
nodes.summary: Validates that insert_leaf appends two leaves and advances NextIndex accordingly.

nodes.name: test_insert_leaf_merkle_tree_full
nodes.summary: Confirms that insertion past the tree capacity returns a MerkleTreeFull error.

nodes.name: test_update_admin
nodes.summary: Validates admin rotation and ensures the new admin is persisted in storage.

nodes.name: test_new_admin_can_insert_after_update
nodes.summary: Ensures that after a successful admin update the new admin can authorize leaf insertions.

nodes.name: test_multiple_insertions
nodes.summary: Inserts several leaves in sequence and verifies the NextIndex counter increments correctly.

nodes.name: test_set_admin_insert_only
nodes.summary: Exercises set_admin_insert_only by toggling the flag both off and on and asserting the stored value.

nodes.name: test_insert_leaf_without_admin_when_permissionless
nodes.summary: Confirms that when AdminInsertOnly is false, anyone can insert leaves without admin authorization.

nodes.name: test_insert_leaf_requires_admin_when_re_enabled
nodes.summary: Verifies the toggle path: after re-enabling AdminInsertOnly, non-admin insertions are rejected.

nodes.name: test_permissionless_insert_multiple_leaves
nodes.summary: Inserts multiple leaves in permissionless mode and confirms NextIndex tracks them correctly.

nodes.name: test_permissionless_insert_updates_root
nodes.summary: Asserts that permissionless insertions also progress the stored Merkle root.

nodes.name: poseidon2_compression
nodes.summary: Off-chain reference Poseidon2 compression using arkworks; used to cross-validate the on-chain implementation.

nodes.name: u256_to_scalar
nodes.summary: Converts a Soroban U256 to an arkworks BN254 scalar field element via big-endian byte conversion.

nodes.name: test_hash_pair_consistency_1
nodes.summary: Cross-validates the on-chain hash_pair against the off-chain Poseidon2 reference for small integer inputs.

nodes.name: test_hash_pair_consistency_2
nodes.summary: Cross-validates hash_pair against the reference Poseidon2 for large 32-byte BN254 field-sized inputs.

nodes.name: test_merkle_consistency
nodes.summary: End-to-end Merkle root parity test that compares on-chain roots after a sequence of insertions against an off-chain Poseidon2-built tree.

nodes.name: DataKey
nodes.summary: Persistent storage key enum for the non-membership SMT covering Admin, Root, and per-node Node entries keyed by hash.

nodes.name: FindResult
nodes.summary: Search result struct carrying whether a key was found, sibling chain for the Merkle proof, the found value, and not-found witness data for non-membership proofs.

nodes.name: Error
nodes.summary: Soroban contracterror enum for the non-membership contract covering authorization, key existence, proof validity, and arithmetic overflow failures.

nodes.name: LeafInsertedEvent
nodes.summary: Event published when a key/value leaf is inserted into the SMT.

nodes.name: LeafUpdatedEvent
nodes.summary: Event published when a leaf's value is updated, including old and new values.

nodes.name: LeafDeletedEvent
nodes.summary: Event published when a leaf is deleted from the SMT.

nodes.name: ASPNonMembership
nodes.summary: Soroban contract struct exposing all sparse Merkle tree entrypoints: constructor, admin rotation, insert/update/delete, find_key, and verify_non_membership.

nodes.name: __constructor
nodes.summary: Initializes the SMT by storing the admin and seeding the root with U256::zero (empty tree).

nodes.name: update_admin
nodes.summary: Rotates the admin via soroban_utils::update_admin.

nodes.name: hash_leaf
nodes.summary: Computes the Poseidon2 leaf hash poseidon2_hash2(key, value) used to identify SMT leaves.

nodes.name: hash_internal
nodes.summary: Computes the Poseidon2 two-to-one compression of two child hashes for internal SMT nodes.

nodes.name: split_bits
nodes.summary: Decomposes a U256 key into its little-endian bit representation used to navigate the SMT path.

nodes.name: find_key_internal
nodes.summary: Recursively walks the SMT by key bits from a given root, returning the found value with siblings or witness data proving non-membership.
nodes.languageNotes: Handles three node tags in stored vectors: leaf (length 3 with tag 0), internal (length 2), and missing children that fall back to zero hashes — implementing JJ-style indexed SMT semantics.

nodes.name: find_key
nodes.summary: Public entrypoint that loads the current root and delegates to find_key_internal to return a FindResult.

nodes.name: insert_leaf
nodes.summary: Admin-gated insertion that extends the SMT with a new key/value, including the split-collision logic that adds intermediate nodes when a new leaf collides with an existing one along its key bits.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements the indexed SMT insertion algorithm: extends the sibling path when the new leaf collides with an existing leaf at fewer levels than required to distinguish their keys.

nodes.name: delete_leaf
nodes.summary: Admin-gated deletion that removes a key from the SMT, collapsing redundant internal nodes when the deletion leaves a single-child subtree.

nodes.name: update_leaf
nodes.summary: Admin-gated in-place value update for an existing key that recomputes the path's hashes and root while emitting LeafUpdatedEvent.

nodes.name: verify_non_membership
nodes.summary: Verifies a non-membership proof by walking the supplied sibling chain and asserting the reconstructed root matches the stored one, given a witness leaf with a different key.
nodes.languageNotes: The witness leaf hash is computed from not_found_key/not_found_value and walked up using the user-supplied siblings; only accepts a proof when the witness key differs from the queried key.

nodes.name: get_root
nodes.summary: Read-only accessor returning the current SMT root from persistent storage.

nodes.name: test_env
nodes.summary: Builds a Soroban test Env with BN254 cost params required for the Poseidon2 host functions used by the SMT.

nodes.name: test_insert_leaf
nodes.summary: Inserts a single (key, value) leaf and asserts the root advances away from zero.

nodes.name: test_update_leaf
nodes.summary: Inserts a leaf, updates its value, and confirms the root changes accordingly.

nodes.name: test_insert_multiple_keys
nodes.summary: Inserts multiple keys and verifies each insertion progresses the root, exercising the split-collision path of the SMT.

nodes.name: test_duplicate_insert_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts that inserting a key that already exists returns KeyAlreadyExists.

nodes.name: test_update_nonexistent_key_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts updating an absent key returns KeyNotFound.

nodes.name: test_root_consistency_with_circuits_insert_1_42
nodes.summary: Cross-validates the on-chain root after inserting (key=1, value=42) against the value expected by the corresponding Circom witness.

nodes.name: test_root_consistency_with_circuits_update_1_100
nodes.summary: Cross-validates the post-update root for (key=1, value=100) against the Circom-computed reference.

nodes.name: test_root_consistency_with_circuits_insert_2_324
nodes.summary: Cross-validates the root after a second insertion (key=2, value=324) matches the Circom-expected root, exercising the multi-leaf path.

nodes.name: test_find_key_public_method
nodes.summary: Exercises the find_key public entrypoint across empty trees, single-leaf trees, and multi-leaf trees, asserting both found and not-found witnesses.

nodes.name: test_delete_single_leaf
nodes.summary: Inserts a leaf, deletes it, and verifies the tree returns to the empty root.

nodes.name: test_delete_from_two_keys
nodes.summary: Exercises deletion when two keys share path prefixes, verifying the collapse of redundant internal nodes.

nodes.name: test_delete_from_multiple_keys
nodes.summary: Deletion test over a tree containing many keys to confirm correct sibling reconstruction across deep paths.

nodes.name: test_delete_nonexistent_key_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts that deleting an absent key returns KeyNotFound.

nodes.name: test_delete_from_empty_tree_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts that deleting from an empty tree returns KeyNotFound.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_empty_tree
nodes.summary: Verifies that verify_non_membership accepts a proof for any key against an empty tree.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_single_leaf_collision
nodes.summary: Verifies non-membership when the queried key would collide with the single existing leaf, requiring the witness key/value of the collider.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_key_exists_returns_false
nodes.summary: Asserts verify_non_membership rejects proofs for keys that actually exist in the tree.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_multiple_leaves_collision
nodes.summary: Verifies non-membership for a queried key whose path collides with one of multiple existing leaves.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_wrong_siblings_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts the verifier rejects proofs with tampered sibling values.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_wrong_not_found_key_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts the verifier rejects proofs with an incorrect witness not_found_key.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_wrong_not_found_value_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts the verifier rejects proofs with an incorrect witness not_found_value.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_wrong_siblings_length_fails
nodes.summary: Asserts the verifier rejects proofs whose sibling chain length does not match the depth expected by the contract.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_after_deletion
nodes.summary: Confirms that after deleting a key, a fresh non-membership proof for that key succeeds.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_after_all_deleted
nodes.summary: Confirms verify_non_membership behaves correctly when every leaf has been deleted, returning to the empty-tree case.

nodes.name: test_verify_non_membership_comprehensive_scenario
nodes.summary: End-to-end scenario combining inserts, updates, deletes, and non-membership proofs to validate SMT invariants over a realistic sequence.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the e2e-tests crate that runs end-to-end integration tests across the privacy payment stack (prover, contracts, ASP).

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the poseidon2 hash function crate with conditional native and wasm32 dependencies, plus tuned release and bench profiles.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses target-cfg dependency tables to split native vs wasm32 builds — required because Poseidon2 backends differ across platforms.

nodes.name: LICENSE-APACHE
nodes.summary: Apache License 2.0 text covering the vendored Poseidon2 reference implementation.

nodes.name: LICENSE-MIT
nodes.summary: MIT License text providing the alternative dual-license option for the vendored Poseidon2 crate.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Short readme for the vendored Poseidon2 hash function crate pointing at the upstream paper and noting a 2023 specification update.

nodes.name: poseidon2_test.rs
nodes.summary: Integration test that instantiates Poseidon2 over BN256 for several widths and exercises the permutation API.

nodes.name: bn256_instances
nodes.summary: Constructs Poseidon2 BN256 instances at multiple state widths and runs a permutation over a simple input vector to verify the API.

nodes.name: build-verifier-with-vk.sh
nodes.summary: Build helper that bakes a snarkjs Groth16 verification_key.json into the circom-groth16-verifier Soroban contract WASM via the crate's build.rs at compile time.
nodes.languageNotes: Embeds the VK at build time via the VERIFIER_VK_JSON env var so the resulting WASM needs no constructor and avoids storage reads during verification.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest defining the ceremony-cli binary used to drive the Groth16 trusted setup (Powers of Tau and circuit-specific phase 2).

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Coordinator and contributor runbook for the Groth16 trusted-setup ceremony, covering Powers of Tau, init/contribute/finalize phases, and deployment artifact export.

nodes.name: export_deployment.rs
nodes.summary: Implements the export-deployment subcommand that converts a finalized zkey into the project's deployment artifacts: proving key bin, snarkjs VK JSON, Soroban VK bin, and Rust VK constant.

nodes.name: export_deployment
nodes.summary: Reads a finalized zkey, round-trips the proving key through arkworks compressed serialization, and writes proving-key bin plus snarkjs-, Soroban-, and Rust-flavored verification key artifacts to the deployment directory.

nodes.name: proving_key_from_zkey
nodes.summary: Helper that opens a snarkjs zkey file and parses it into an arkworks Bn254 ProvingKey via ark-circom's read_zkey.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Entry point and command dispatcher for ceremony-cli, defining clap subcommands (init, contribute, finalize, export-deployment) and orchestrating snarkjs phase-2 invocations through a CommandRunner abstraction with a mockable test harness.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses a CommandRunner trait + ProcessRunner production impl and MockRunner test impl so the entire ceremony flow can be exercised in unit tests without spawning snarkjs; sensitive flags are redacted from logged command lines.

nodes.name: Cli
nodes.summary: Top-level clap parser describing the ceremony-cli command surface.

nodes.name: Commands
nodes.summary: Enum of ceremony-cli subcommands: Init, Contribute, Finalize, and ExportDeployment.

nodes.name: CeremonyArgs
nodes.summary: Argument struct for the init subcommand: circuit selection, Powers of Tau file, output path, and force flag.

nodes.name: ContributeArgs
nodes.summary: Argument struct for the contribute subcommand specifying the input zkey, circuit, ptau, output, and contributor name.

nodes.name: FinalizeArgs
nodes.summary: Argument struct for the finalize subcommand, including the random beacon hash and power used to derive the final zkey.

nodes.name: ExportDeploymentArgs
nodes.summary: Argument struct for the export-deployment subcommand pointing at the finalized zkey and the deployment artifact output directory.

nodes.name: CommandRunner
nodes.summary: Trait abstracting subprocess execution so production code can shell out to snarkjs while tests inject a mock runner.

nodes.name: ProcessRunner
nodes.summary: Default CommandRunner implementation that spawns real subprocesses with inherited stdio.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: ProcessRunner::run implementation that logs the (redacted) command, spawns it with inherited stdio, and reports duration and exit status.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Binary entry point that parses the CLI and dispatches into execute with a real ProcessRunner.

nodes.name: execute
nodes.summary: Dispatches a parsed Cli into the matching subcommand handler (init, contribute, finalize, export_deployment) using the supplied runner.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Drives the snarkjs groth16 setup phase to produce an initial zkey from a circuit r1cs and ptau file.

nodes.name: contribute
nodes.summary: Takes a participant through a phase-2 contribution: generates zeroized entropy, calls snarkjs zkey contribute, and optionally verifies the resulting zkey.

nodes.name: finalize
nodes.summary: Applies a public random beacon to the last contribution and exports the final verification key, validating the beacon hash and output paths.

nodes.name: export_deployment
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper that forwards to the export_deployment module to produce repo deployment artifacts from a finalized zkey.

nodes.name: print_file_size
nodes.summary: Logs a human-readable size for a generated artifact file.

nodes.name: format_bytes_human
nodes.summary: Formats a byte count into a human-readable string with KiB/MiB/GiB suffixes.

nodes.name: format_command
nodes.summary: Renders a program plus its argv into a shell-quoted display string, deferring to format_command_with_redactions with no sensitive flags.

nodes.name: format_command_with_redactions
nodes.summary: Builds a shell-quoted command string while redacting values that follow user-specified sensitive flags so entropy and similar secrets never appear in logs.

nodes.name: resolve_snarkjs_circuit_path
nodes.summary: Normalizes a user-supplied circuit path: if a .wasm is provided it pivots to the sibling .r1cs that snarkjs actually needs.

nodes.name: resolve_circuits
nodes.summary: Resolves the circuit r1cs path either from an explicit user argument or by auto-discovering it from the workspace build tree.

nodes.name: discover_r1cs
nodes.summary: Walks up to the workspace root and globs target/circuits for r1cs files matching the named circuit, preferring release builds and most recently modified candidates.

nodes.name: generate_entropy_hex
nodes.summary: Draws 32 bytes from getrandom, hex-encodes them into a Zeroizing string for use as a phase-2 contribution entropy, and wipes the source buffer.
nodes.languageNotes: Wraps the entropy in Zeroizing<String> so the hex secret is scrubbed from memory on drop.

nodes.name: assert_readable_file
nodes.summary: Validates that a path exists and is a regular file, returning a labeled error otherwise.

nodes.name: assert_dir_exists
nodes.summary: Validates that a path exists and is a directory.

nodes.name: assert_output_allowed
nodes.summary: Refuses to overwrite an existing output path unless the user explicitly passed --force.

nodes.name: validate_beacon_hash
nodes.summary: Checks that a beacon hash string is hex-only and a positive even length so it can be parsed as bytes downstream.

nodes.name: print_next_steps
nodes.summary: Prints follow-up commands a coordinator or contributor should run after a ceremony phase succeeds.
